TECH ‚Äî warm-JI bed ~7 ‚Üí **jury-BANNED**; concatenative/spectral-morph present but NOT decomposition. VIBE ‚Äî warm/serene/cozy ~9 ‚Üí **jury-BANNED**. `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ touch INPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ warm-JI-drone/chord bed (~7√ó) ¬∑ warm/serene/cozy VIBE (~9√ó) ¬∑ third-ocean-data] ¬∑ picked=[**audio-file (his real piano) + keyboard/tilt off-glass INPUT** (not a fingertip, not mic, not camera) ¬∑ **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D) ¬∑ **median-filter HPSS source-separation TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat, not concatenative) ¬∑ **clinical/dissective "vivisection" VIBE** (REVEALS the machine inside his warm piano ‚Äî the opposite of cozy)]` ‚Äî clean on every banned tag, and the directest execution of the jury's provocation #4. *(Note: keyboard+tilt control echoes 601's combo, but it's 1√ó in the window and not banned; the SOURCE-as-input [his audio file] + the decomposition technique are the fresh axes.)*

**mode: DEEP** ‚Äî three folder-isolated parallel builders, numbers pre-allocated 606/607/608, each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route (READ the existing `/api/audio/[id]` only). ALL share: fetch Karel's real piano (`549fc519-‚Ä¶`, 4s AbortController, JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes) with a synthesized solo-piano OfflineAudioContext fallback so decomposition ALWAYS has content; ~9s mono @22kHz slice; STFT Hann 1024/hop 256 keeping complex bins; phase-preserving soft-mask ISTFT overlap-add; chunked decompose with a progress bar (no UI freeze); WebGL2 (off Canvas2D) spectral viz; off-glass keyboard + iOS-gated device-tilt control with secondary on-screen faders; `gain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor ‚Üí destination`; graceful `text-rose-300` degradation; ~2.5s idle auto-demo. Briefs (ONE concept, three techniques):
- **`606-piano-vivisection`** ‚Äî median-filter **HPSS**: split his piano into sustained harmonic strings (time-median) vs transient percussive hammers (freq-median), soft Wiener masks, morph the balance. Refs: Fitzgerald DAFx 2010.
- **`607-piano-prism`** ‚Äî **NMF**: factor S‚âàW¬∑H into 6 learned spectral components √ó activations (KL multiplicative updates), solo/mute/re-mix each. Refs: Lee & Seung 1999; Smaragdis & Brown 2003.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** ‚Äî **sinusoidal+residual (SMS)**: peak-pick deterministic tonal partials vs the stochastic residual (hammer/breath/room), sift + freeze + stretch. Refs: Serra & Smith 1990.

**Act ‚Äî DEEP 3-technique fan-out (all returned demoable + clean tsc+ESLint in isolation; all share the his-piano fetch+fallback, ~9s STFT pipeline, phase-preserving mask ISTFT, WebGL2 viz, off-glass keyboard/tilt, gentle limiter, auto-demo):**
- **`606-piano-vivisection` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî median-filter HPSS strings-vs-hammers. Files: `page.tsx` (576), `hpss.ts` (384), `gl.ts` (301), `audio.ts` (142), `README.md`. WebGL2 field draws harmonic as cyan/steel horizontal streaks + percussive as magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead. R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback.
- **`607-piano-prism`** (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß425) ‚Äî NMF 6-component prism, KL updates, per-component looping buffers behind per-component gains, colored bands + activation lanes. Files: `page.tsx` (633), `gl.ts` (265), `nmf.ts` (202), `audio.ts` (362), `README.md`.
- **`608-piano-sieve`** (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß425) ‚Äî SMS tonal-vs-residual sieve + freeze + stretch, gold/white partial lines vs grey-blue noise cloud. Files: `page.tsx` (778), `gl.ts` (320), `audio.ts` (416), `README.md`.

**Curate ‚Üí WINNER `606-piano-vivisection`.** All three are honest 3/5 (#1+#2+#3) and dodge every banned tag (WebGL2 off-Canvas2D, keyboard/tilt off-glass, no warm-JI bed, dissective-not-cozy), so the deciding axes were: (1) **most legible result for the 06:30 glance** ‚Äî "his strings ringing vs. his hammers knocking" is instantly graspable; **607's NMF components are unsupervised spectral clusters, not nameable** (the builder flagged this ‚Äî abstract bands), and 608's tonal-vs-noise-cloud is subtler. (2) **most reliable** ‚Äî median-filter HPSS near-always yields a clean audible split on any piano; NMF quality depends on random-init convergence and 608's freeze/stretch are explicitly approximate (its `playbackRate` stretch slightly pitch-shifts ‚Äî builder-flagged). (3) **most personal + surprising for a pianist** ‚Äî isolating the two physical mechanisms of his OWN piano (string vs hammer) is a genuine "huh!" and emotionally resonant, the way 557/583 won. (4) **fewest failure points** ‚Äî the simplest, most robust DSP of the trio. **607 banked** (the most technically ambitious + the gorgeous prism metaphor ‚Äî the strongest cycle-2 deepening, or fuse: HPSS pre-split ‚Üí NMF the harmonic layer) + **608 banked** (tonal-vs-noise + freeze/stretch playground ‚Äî resurrect for a dedicated spectral-freeze/phase-vocoder fire) IDEAS ¬ß425.

**Validate:** Grep-scanned the winner: **0** helper functions named `use[A-Z]` (only legit React hooks), the `as any` casts (`webkitAudioContext`, GL) each carry `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`, **0** ts-ignore/nocheck, no `api/` folder ‚Üí **no guard needed**, `"use client"` present, README link `/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md` (sibling pattern). Banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß425 ‚Üí `rm -rf` 607/608 with absolute paths ‚Üí `git status` confirmed ONLY `606-piano-vivisection/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 101s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (461/461)`** (the one new route), `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ‚óã. **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed.** `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. Scope clean. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (606):** (a) **not run in a live browser** ‚Äî verified by the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **the perceptual quality of the HPSS split** ‚Äî the median-filter math + soft Wiener masks + phase-preserving ISTFT are coded to spec and correct-looking, but only real speakers confirm the strings/hammers separation sounds clean (median kernels 17/17 + power-2 masks are eye-tuned; real piano may want adjustment). (c) **the WebGL2 R32F float-texture path** (with the R8 fallback) is type/lint-clean but never hit a real GPU. (d) **the his-piano fetch** depends on the prod `/api/audio` route being reachable at runtime; the synthesized fallback guarantees the instrument always works even offline. The ~2.5s idle auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean the hands-free 06:30 glance always shows the spectral field separating + (un-muted) hears the layers, and Karel can morph his own piano apart at his desk.

- **`586-kids-light-painter`** (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß418) ‚Äî two thumbsticks pull continuous Canvas2D light-ribbons; stick magnitude continuously **bends** a JI add9 over a drone (portamento, no taps); face buttons bloom bells. 701-line page.
- **`587-kids-button-garden` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî the four face buttons are four warm JI voices (1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8) that bloom glowing Canvas2D flowers; the **d-pad shifts the SEASON** (palette + root transpose); triggers swell wind, left stick parallax-sways; dual-rumble thumps on bloom. 720-line page.
- **`588-kids-glow-drive`** (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß418) ‚Äî left stick steers a comet through a fixed autonomous field of light-seeds; the nearest wakes/ripples/sings (spatial JI scale by position); right stick blooms a halo. 646-line page.

**Curate ‚Üí WINNER `587-kids-button-garden`.** All three cleared the SAME floor (3/5: #1+#2+#3) and dodged every banned tag, so the deciding axis was **kids-legibility for a 4-year-old** + warmth + glance-demo:
- **587 wins** ‚Äî **mash a big button ‚Üí a flower instantly blooms and sings** is the most immediate cause‚Üíeffect for the youngest hands; it needs **no analog-stick coordination** (586 needs two sticks + a "push-harder=higher" abstraction a 4yo won't grasp) and **no steering precision** (588's reward is more ambient/passive). It has the **richest discoverable depth** (5 subsystems; the d-pad *seasons* = palette + key change is a real "the whole world changed!" delight a kid will find by mashing), explicit **just-intonation** (clean of the banned pentatonic wash), and its button-mash‚Üíbloom maps a brand-new INPUT onto Karel's **loved kids paint/bloom cluster**. Strongest silent-glance demo (autonomous flowers bloom + seasons drift).
- **586 banked** (IDEAS ¬ß418) ‚Äî the most *musically expressive* (continuous two-stick chord-bend), but the least legible for a 4yo; resurrect as an adult/older-kid expressive-controller piece or fold its continuous bend into 587 as a held-trigger "expressive" layer.
- **588 banked** (IDEAS ¬ß418) ‚Äî the cleanest answer to the frozen-creature ban (a *field*, not a pet) and one-stick steering is accessible, but the mash‚Üíbloom of 587 is a more direct toddler reward; resurrect for a calm spatial/ambient kids fire or as a one-stick younger sibling.

**Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept ‚Äî *today's real local weather, played as a kids music window* ‚Äî via three renderer/interaction approaches; numbers pre-allocated 573/574/575; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; all shared: direct client-side Open-Meteo fetch + optional geolocation w/ silent default-coordinate fallback + baked demo-sky for offline + WMO‚Üíconsonant-scale/mood mapping + kids-safe limiter + alive-from-frame-one visuals):**
- **`575-kids-sky-song` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî the weather COMPOSES: a generative look-ahead "weather song" (8-step ostinato that mutates + re-seeds over time, Eno-style; tempo from wind, density from cloud, key from weather_code) playing itself over a raw-WebGL2 aurora; the child touches to perform in today's key. Touch = play notes in the weather-set scale. **LOST, not on quality:** the most beautiful sky, but 575's generative engine is the bigger *concept* leap ("the weather *composes*" vs "the weather *tints* what you tap"), and an abstract shader sky reads less instantly than 575's self-blooming notes at a silent glance. - **`574-kids-weather-today` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß412, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî the warmest / most 4yo-legible: a Canvas2D cut-paper diorama (smiling sun/moon, paper critter, falling rain/snow, layered hills); tap friendly elements to play in today's key. **LOST:** despite the real-data headline it is closest in *form* to the lab's existing synthetic weather toys (`115`/`120`) ‚Äî the "too similar in shape" risk ‚Äî and the least ambitious renderer (Canvas2D, no generative engine). Resurrect for a warmth-forward / maximally-legible fire, or ship as 575's more-literal sibling for the youngest users; the most iPad-bulletproof. Complete + clean tsc+eslint.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß412 ‚Üí `rm -rf` 573/574 with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding the persisted-cwd no-op trap) ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `575-kids-sky-song/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had reported `completed` before removal ‚Äî no re-materialization race) ‚Üí grep-scanned the winner (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`, audio.ts] carries `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; no `ts-ignore`/`ts-nocheck`; no api route; the two `<svg>` are play/tap UI glyphs, NOT the renderer; `"use client"` present) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 34.9s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (448/448)`** (447‚Üí448 = the one new route), `/dream/575-kids-sky-song 8.21 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is the WebGL2 renderer). **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed.** `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. Scope clean. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no WebGL2/audio/geolocation/network in this sandbox).

(e) **WebGL2 aurora perf on iPad** untested; iOS has WebGL2 so the main path should run, and the Canvas2D fallback covers failure. (f) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock coded to spec, untested on hardware. The alive-from-frame-one visuals + baked-sky fallback mean the silent hands-free glance always shows a living sky making music, and since Karel reviews on a device he can grant location + hear his actual local weather.

## Cycle 410 ‚Äî 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (410 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `569-kids-ember-keeper` ‚Äî **The lab's FIRST cross-session persistent state: a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped BODY each day a child returns ‚Äî and never resets. The directest literal answer to the jury's standing #6: "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow."**

**The build (winner `569`):** five subsystems + the cross-day persistence spine. (1) **Cross-session persistence** (`genome.ts`) ‚Äî a JSON genome in `localStorage` (`resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) that ONLY accumulates: `visits`, `distinctDays`, `totalHumSeconds`, a learned pentatonic `palette`, and an **append-only `tokens` list** (body parts). No decrement, no reset path anywhere ‚Äî the immutable-growth invariant is the soul. (2) **Day-aware growth** ‚Äî on load, stored `lastVisitDay` vs `new Date().toDateString()`; a NEW calendar day appends one big **"day" limb** on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral around the core, so today's body is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, a hummed note or a pet appends a small permanent **"hum" frond** + brightens the ember. (3) **Deterministic regrowth** (`makeBody`) ‚Äî each token carries a stable `id`; a `mulberry32` PRNG seeded from the id means the same genome ALWAYS regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads ‚Äî D'Arcy Thompson's "growth as rule-based addition of parts" made literal). (4) **Analysis-only voice feeding** ‚Äî mic ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` float buffer ‚Üí autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) ‚Üí quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) ‚Üí echoed back softly + the integer degree added to the palette. The **analyser is a dead-end node** (never connected to destination); samples read per-frame + discarded; only the derived degree persists ‚Äî mic is genuinely never recorded/stored/transmitted. (5) **three.js render + Web Audio** ‚Äî emissive core + per-token limbs/fronds, the newest part scale+emissive-pops into place over ~2.6 s on wake; kids-safe `gain ‚Üí BiquadFilter lowpass(8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí10, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter, all gains `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built inside the Wake gesture (`window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext`, eslint-disabled). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (can't wait a real day): empty storage ‚Üí `makeDemoGenome()` seeds a believable history (**5 visits / 4 days / 5-note palette / 10 tokens = 4 day-limbs + 6 fronds**), so the glance always shows a rich many-limbed creature breathing from frame one + singing on wake; a clearly-secondary **üåô next-day** button (top-right, outside the play area) TIME-TRAVELS so Karel watches a brand-new limb sparkle in on demand. **Graceful degradation both axes:** mic-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a **DOM/CSS** orb (one petal per token) that still glows/grows/sings (NOT Canvas2D, per brief). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js ‚Äî no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 404‚Äì409); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `62abff3` = cycle 409 `568-conductor-hands` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **568**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **569/570/571** to three builders (verified free as FOLDERS; NOTE the ¬ß409 banked text-seeds `569-conductor-batons`/`570-conductor-baton-motion` are stale number-labels ‚Äî those slugs now belong to this cycle's Ember pieces; the conductor seeds renumber on revival, per the banking convention).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß410):** two WebSearches ‚Äî (a) persistent/evolving generative creatures & pets across days in the browser, 2026; (b) arxiv cs.SD June 2026 memory/long-form/stateful generative music. Most on-theme: **Niantic's "Peridot generative-AI virtual creatures"** + the broader **AI-pets wave** (rctAI, Loona) ‚Äî *a companion that is genuinely different when you return* is a current commercial frontier. cs.SD remains server-ML/latent-diffusion (long-form latent-diffusion; SMDIM Feb 2026; concept-steering Mar 2026) ‚Äî none client-buildable, none <14-days ‚Üí **#5 NOT claimable, said plainly** (the carried honesty, per the jury's own #5 call-out). **Chain visible:** dive (persistent generative companions are the live worth-mining lane; the lab has NEVER persisted anything across sessions in 569 prototypes) ‚Üí today's build consumes the jury's #6 with the dive as validation.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ‚Äî the JURY-naming-a-piece-to-extend override fires: JURY 2026-06-12 **#6 explicitly names `518-living-ember`** ("the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days ‚Äî extend THAT: a creature a child finds genuinely changed *tomorrow*"). Per AGENT.md ("if JURY says 'prototype X is exceptional, extend it,' go DEEP on X") this overrides the 409-DEEP‚Üí410-WIDE alternation. Three approaches attacked ONE concept (*a creature genuinely different each day you return; it never resets*) via three things that can evolve across days: BODY (569) / SONG (570) / WORLD (571).

NOTE: 549-kids-song-friend (cycle 402) earlier touched the companion lane, but the jury ‚Äî reviewing a window that includes 549 ‚Äî STILL names 518/#6 as undelivered; cross-DAY-difference (a creature you find changed *tomorrow*) had never been built, because **the lab has never persisted state across sessions at all**. That gap is the headline.
- **Ambition floor (winner `569`): honest 4/5** ‚Äî `ambition: #1 cross-session persistent state (grep-verified lab-FIRST ‚Äî no prior dream piece writes to localStorage + reloads across visits/days; this is the genuinely-new technique, not a reskin) + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (autocorrelation pitch + accumulating-genome persistence engine + deterministic phyllotaxis morphology + three.js render + Web Audio = 5) + #3 named refs that DRIVE it (Tamagotchi [Maita/Bandai 1996] ‚Äî lives in the device & rewards returning, the soul; Steve Grand *Creatures* [1996] ‚Äî accumulating internal state drives outward FORM; D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form* [1917] ‚Äî golden-angle limb placement taken directly) + #4 multi-cycle Ember spine cycle 1`. **#5 NOT claimed** (no <14-day bind; cs.SD server-ML ‚Äî honesty over a phantom score; the dive validates the lane not a result). The clean 4/5 (not the contestable 3/5 of recent cycles) ‚Äî #1 is a real grep-verified lab-first this time.
- **Diversity audit (last 10 prototypes 568/566/564/559/557/553/552/549/545/541):** OUTPUT: SVG = 3√ó (559/552/549 ‚Äî 538 rolled out as 568 rolled in, so SVG fell BELOW the 4√ó ban but is nudging it); three.js = 2√ó (568/566); WebGL2 = 2√ó (564/557). No output ‚â•4 ‚Üí no fresh audit ban this cycle. INPUT: camera-hands 568, shake 566, audio-file 564/557, mic 559, tilt 553, touch/drag 541 ‚Äî none ‚â•4. TECH: none ‚â•4. VIBE: kids structural. **Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept ‚Äî *a creature genuinely different each day you return; never resets* ‚Äî via what evolves; numbers pre-allocated 569/570/571; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; all shared the cross-session-persistence spine + day-aware growth + analysis-only mic + kids-safe limiter + fresh-device seed + üåô time-travel):**
- **`569-kids-ember-keeper` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî the BODY evolves: a three.js creature regrown from an append-only genome; a new calendar day adds a phyllotaxis limb.
- **`570-kids-ember-song` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß410, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî the SONG evolves: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven (Eno-style generative recombination) into a longer/richer piece each return; WebGL2 luminous orbiting strands, one per remembered phrase. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `weave.ts`, `render.ts`, `song-memory.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The biggest CONCEPT of the trio** (the music itself grows across sessions ‚Äî a true lab-first nobody else has). **Lost on glance-legibility, not quality** ‚Äî its cross-day payoff is *audible* (a longer song), so at a SILENT 06:30 glance the abstract strands read less clearly than 569's visibly-bigger body. Resurrect for a music-forward kids fire, or fold in as 569's cycle-2 "it also sings your grown song."
- **`571-kids-ember-nest` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß410, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî the WORLD evolves: each visit plants a permanent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend, each a sustained pentatonic voice ‚Üí a fuller world = a denser, warmer always-consonant additive chord (`0.16/‚àön` per-voice keeps it kids-safe). Removes Tamagotchi's death/punishment loop (returning is always rewarded, never guilt). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx`, `scene.ts`, `shapes.ts`, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **The warmest + most-legible-to-a-4yo** (a busy nest reads instantly). **Lost:** thematically closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` (self-seeding singing garden ‚Äî the "too similar" risk) AND another SVG output nudges the rolling-10 SVG toward the 4√ó ban (it sat at 3√ó). Resurrect when SVG is clear; add non-overlapping placement + a voice cap for months-old worlds.

**Curate ‚Äî why 569 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (4/5: #1 shared cross-session persistence + #2 + #3 + #4; #5 honestly unavailable), so the deciding axes were (1) **jury-#6 literalness** ‚Äî #6 asks for "a *creature* a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"; 569's body visibly growing new limbs is the directest read (the CREATURE itself is changed), vs 570's changed *song* or 571's changed *world*; (2) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** ‚Äî a bigger many-limbed creature reads "it grew!" instantly at a silent glance, where 570's payoff must be *heard*; (3) **diversity vs the existing kids set + the SVG edge** ‚Äî a persistent-morphology creature is genuinely lab-first, whereas 571's filling-world echoes `116-kids-bloom-garden` and another SVG nudges the 4√ó ban; (4) **surprise (Karel's #2)** ‚Äî the lab has never persisted anything across sessions; a creature that is literally a bigger, different organism each day is Tamagotchi-grade emotional pull the lab has never had. 570 (the biggest concept ‚Äî resurrect for a music fire / as 569's cycle-2 song layer) + 571 (the warmest, most-legible ‚Äî resurrect when SVG clears) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß410 ‚Üí `rm -rf` 570/571 with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding ¬ß408's persisted-cwd no-op trap) ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `569-kids-ember-keeper/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ‚Äî status `completed` ‚Äî before removal, heeding ¬ß399/¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson; 571's builder also self-removed two stray `nest-*.ts` scaffolding files it didn't import) ‚Üí grep-scanned the winner for ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`, audio.ts:25] carries `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` on the line above; no `ts-nocheck`/`ts-ignore`; no api route; README `./README.md` link present; README opens `**For**: kids (4+)` for dashboard tagging) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 101s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (446/446)`** (445‚Üí446 = the one new route), `/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper 6.03 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; zero referencing the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (569):** (a) **not run in a real browser** ‚Äî verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **real multi-day behaviour** (waiting actual calendar days) is exercised only via the üåô time-travel control + `loadAndVisit`'s `toDateString` comparison ‚Äî never observed across real wall-clock days; **DST / timezone hops** around the day-boundary could mis-count a day (the üåô button exists precisely so growth demos without trusting the clock). (c) **pitch detection** tuned for humming in a quiet room; very noisy rooms / very low/high voices may quantize oddly (can never sound "wrong", but the *learned* note may not match intent). (d) **unbounded growth** ‚Äî the genome is append-only by design; after hundreds of parts the scene crowds/slows, no cap or LOD yet (a real returning child accumulates slowly, so this is a far-future concern; a months-old creature is the stress case). (e) **iOS Safari** mic + AudioContext-in-gesture unlock coded to spec, untested on hardware; `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari. (f) **localStorage blocked / private mode** ‚Üí save fails silently, creature still plays for the session (no error shown ‚Äî deliberate, no fail state for kids). The fresh-device demo seed + üåô time-travel are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a rich, clearly-grown creature with zero setup; and since Karel reviews on a device, he can grant the mic and actually hum to it.

## Cycle 409 ‚Äî 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (409 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `568-conductor-hands` ‚Äî **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine, made EMBODIED: raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi ‚Äî your left hand beats one voice, your right beats another; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (‚àö2, œÜ, e/2, œÄ/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can NEVER share a downbeat. Metric dissonance you feel in your own arms ‚Äî the jury's exact #1+#4 ask.**

**The build (winner `568`):** three subsystems + the embodied conducting layer. (1) **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) ‚Äî `HandLandmarker` loaded via CDN ESM dynamic import (the 419/258 pattern, NOT an npm dep) + `getUserMedia({video})`; each hand's wrist (landmark 0) vertical position tracked per frame; a downbeat fires at the *bottom of a conducting stroke* (velocity zero-crossing downward‚Üíupward, 150 ms debounce); the last-3 inter-beat-interval average ‚Üí that hand's tempo, clamped 200‚Äì1600 ms (‚âà37‚Äì300 BPM). Left hand = voice A, right hand = voice B (handedness mirror-mapped). (2) **The incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`, the soul) ‚Äî voice A plays the gestured base period; `desiredRatio = gestured ratio folded ‚â•1`, then SNAP to the irrational *nearest in log-space* from {‚àö2‚âà1.414, œÜ‚âà1.618, e/2‚âà1.359, œÄ/2‚âà1.571}; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio`. The human chooses the neighbourhood, the math guarantees non-periodicity ‚Äî the two pulses can never re-share a downbeat. Active ratio + name shown live. (3) **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî `PolytempoEngine`: two warm pluck voices (triangle fundamental + soft octave-sine partial, fast pluck envelope) playing the same rising/falling D-pentatonic cell, voice B up a perfect fifth (√ó1.5) ‚Äî consonant + distinguishable; each voice has its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval` pump scheduling `osc.start(t)` ~120 ms ahead, never setTimeout-per-note); master `gain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí10, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built inside the Start click (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js phase-space** (`render.ts`) ‚Äî two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period); a **Lissajous ribbon (x=voice-A phase, y=voice-B phase) that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational ‚Äî the geometric signature of a Nancarrow tempo canon, the *visible* proof the pulses never realign; each marker flashes (emissive bump + halo) on its scheduled beat; dark indigo field, violet=A / amber=B. (5) **Frame-one silent auto-demo** ‚Äî the phase-space animates two synthetic conductors at a default œÜ from load, audio silent until the Start gesture (autoplay rules), so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the two-pulse drift. **Camera-denied / MediaPipe-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads ("Beat A"/"Beat B")** (fully playable, tap-interval ‚Üí tempo). Camera + landmark data **local only** (never recorded/uploaded/networked). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio + three.js ‚Äî no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three` already in package.json; MediaPipe via CDN).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 404‚Äì408); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `0294624` = cycle 408 `566-kids-shake-band` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **566**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **568/569/570** to three builders (verified free; the ¬ß408 banked-seed slugs 565/567 left untouched as text).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß409):** two WebSearches ‚Äî (a) arxiv cs.SD recent + beat-tracking/polytempo/metric-structure June 2026, (b) browser audio-visual / WebGPU creative-coding May‚ÄìJune 2026 ‚Äî + a direct fetch of `arxiv.org/list/cs.SD/recent` (June 8‚Äì12). Most on-topic: **S√° Pinto/Bernardes/Davies "Challenging Beat Tracking: Polyrhythm, Polymetre, Polytempo with Human-in-the-Loop Adaptation"** (covers Reich *Piano Phase*, Candombe, Bambuco) ‚Äî **but it's 2023 work, a named *reference* not a <14-day bind.** cs.SD recent (verified June 8‚Äì12) had ZERO beat-tracking/rhythm/interactive-performance papers (server-ML read carried since ¬ß386). **#5 NOT claimable, said plainly** (the jury's own #5 flagged the decayed research rule ‚Äî honesty is the point). The dive DID confirm the concept's live pedigree (human-in-the-loop polytempo beat-tracking is an active thread), validating the embodied-conducting framing. **Chain visible:** dive (no <14-day bind; jury #1 names 514 for the 4/5 chase + #4 names the embodied-polytempo seam directly) ‚Üí today's build makes the 514 loom embodied.

The DEEP trio spread INPUT camera-hands / multitouch-tap-tempo / device-motion-baton √ó OUTPUT three.js / WebGL2 / three.js ‚Äî three embodiment forms of the one concept.
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved body/gesture-interaction cluster (`217-dance-avatar`‚ù§Ô∏è body‚Üísound, `234-kids-hand-creature`‚ù§Ô∏è hand-tracking, `101-camera-song`‚ù§Ô∏è camera input) softly backs a hand-conducted instrument; additive ‚Äî the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated general-purpose builders, ONE concept ‚Äî *the human conducts two incommensurable tempi with their body* ‚Äî via three embodiment forms; numbers pre-allocated 568/569/570; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**

**Curate ‚Äî why 568 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (#2+#3+#4, #1 contestable, #5 honestly unavailable) and dodged the SVG ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **diversity / the "too similar" mandate** ‚Äî 570's device-motion repeats cycle 408's exact input; 569's tap is finger-on-glass (jury's flagged lane); 568's camera hand-tracking is the freshest input vs the last 4 cycles AND the directest dodge of the 7√ó finger ban; (2) **the jury-#4 literal answer** ‚Äî "two gestures set incommensurable tempi" is *exactly* 568 (each hand a conductor of one voice), the single-user form of the jury's "two people's gestures"; (3) **embodiment + surprise (Karel's #2)** ‚Äî conducting two tempi with two hands in the air is the most viscerally embodied of the three (metric dissonance you feel in your arms), the lab has never shipped a gesture-conducted instrument; (4) **glance-robustness** ‚Äî all three auto-demo silently from frame one, but 568 also lets Karel grant the camera and *actually conduct* at his 06:30 review. 569 (the cleanest + most legible ‚Äî the cycle-3 viz to borrow) + 570 (the phone-native companion) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß409 ‚Üí `rm -rf 569 570` with ABSOLUTE paths (heeding ¬ß408's persisted-cwd no-op trap) ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `568-conductor-hands/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ‚Äî status `completed` ‚Äî before removal, heeding ¬ß399/¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson) ‚Üí grep-scanned the winner for ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; the one `as any` [`webkitAudioContext`] carries an `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; no `ts-nocheck`; no api route; README link present) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 71s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (445/445)`** (444‚Üí445 = the one new route), `/dream/568-conductor-hands 5.5 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js + MediaPipe). **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors/warnings referencing the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (568):** (a) **not run in a real browser** ‚Äî verified by the builder's `tsc --noEmit` + ESLint + the authoritative `npm run build` only. (b) **MediaPipe handedness ‚Üí user-hand mapping** ‚Äî the "Right" label is mapped to the user's left hand (mirror convention); unconfirmed live, worst case the two voices swap which hand drives them (harmless). (c) **beat-apex tuning** ‚Äî the velocity threshold (`0.002` normalized/frame) + 150 ms debounce are reasoned defaults, untuned against real conducting gestures / varying frame rates. (d) **GPU-delegate fallback** ‚Äî MediaPipe requested with `delegate:"GPU"`; on devices without WebGL2 for the delegate it may throw ‚Üí falls back to tap pads rather than retrying `"CPU"`. (e) **visual phase vs audible beat** ‚Äî markers integrate phase on the rAF clock while audio schedules on the AudioContext clock; the beat *flashes* are scheduler-driven (stay aligned) but the orbiting markers can drift tens of ms over long sessions, uncorrected. (f) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; the README `<Link>` to the GitHub README is an external link (no 404 route, unlike the lab-wide `./README.md` pattern). The frame-one silent auto-demo + tap-pad fallback are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the perpetual drift; and since Karel reviews on a device with a camera, he can actually conduct it.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 410 (kids, even):** alternation says WIDE next (409 was DEEP), unless the next jury names a kids piece. SVG was the rolling-10 ban this cycle; run the audit fresh. The jury's #6 (extend `518-living-ember` ‚Äî a creature genuinely changed across days) remains the standing highest-value KIDS move if a fresh WIDE doesn't surface something bigger.
- **568 cycle-3 (the polytempo spine, if Karel loves it):** go **multi-user** ‚Äî two phones / two real conductors set incommensurable tempi over WebRTC (the jury's literal "two PEOPLE's gestures"; WebRTC would be a genuine lab-first #1); and/or borrow `569`'s scrolling Nancarrow piano-roll viz for legibility (swap the abstract Lissajous). The clean 4/5 path: multi-user (#1) + the embodied spine (#4) + Nancarrow refs (#3) + ‚â•3 subsystems (#2).
- **Banked this fire (IDEAS ¬ß409):** `569-conductor-batons` (tap-tempo WebGL2 Nancarrow roll ‚Äî the legible cycle-3 viz) + `570-conductor-baton-motion` (DeviceMotion baton ‚Äî the phone-native companion).
- **Carried open spines:** Polytempo/time-tension (514‚Üí545‚Üí568, the spine the jury named for the 4/5 chase, NOW embodied), Splat (557‚Üí564, the strongest 4/5 lineage ‚Äî splat cycle-3 [full-EWA + real captured scene] still banked, deferred to break the 3-in-a-row "too similar" trap), Xenharmonic Drone (538‚Üí552), Companion/Presence kids (518‚Üí549), Living Earth (463‚Üí471), Resonant Room (475‚Üí486), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532‚Üí557), Living-flock (537), Liquid-light kids (541), Tilt-fountain kids (553), Clap-canon kids (559), Shake-band kids (566).

## Cycle 408 ‚Äî 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (408 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `566-kids-shake-band` ‚Äî **Shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian batucada band dances and plays back in time: gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum, and five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument. The child's whole arm is the instrument ‚Äî off-glass, embodied, joyful.**

**The build (winner `566`):** off-glass shake input + three.js stage + synthesized percussion ensemble + always-on groove bed. (1) **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`) ‚Äî `accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude ‚Üí adaptive threshold (1.4√ó rolling average, 3.5 m/s¬≤ floor) with an 80 ms refractory; intensity tiers (‚âà3/9/18 m/s¬≤) select which instrument fires; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` called synchronously inside the Start click (the `await` after). (2) **Pointer-drag-velocity fallback** ‚Äî drag speed in px/ms drives the same magnitude‚Üíhit mapping so it's playable on a laptop/denied-permission. (3) **Web Audio batucada voice pool** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî five from-scratch synth voices (surdo = sine 130‚Üí42 Hz pitch-drop, caixa = bandpass noise + triangle snap, repique = sine + noise transient, agog√¥ = three sine partials, chocalho = soft bandpass-noise grain); master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(7.5 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí10 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. (4) **Groove-bed scheduler** ‚Äî a look-ahead loop at 92 BPM plays a 16-step batucada pattern (surdo 1+3, caixa 2+4, repique fills, agog√¥ accent on 1, chocalho off-beats) always-on, so the child's shakes layer ON TOP of a musical bed and it always sounds good. (5) **three.js stage** (`page.tsx`) ‚Äî five glowing `IcosahedronGeometry` characters (`MeshStandardMaterial` emissive) with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce (exp ~50 ms decay ‚Üí feels immediate), gentle camera sway. (6) **Zero-permission auto-demo:** CSS-animated colored orbs bounce from frame one (audio waits for the Start gesture for autoplay rules), and the groove bed plays itself once started ‚Äî so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band. **Motion denied/unsupported ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + drag fallback active.** **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client DeviceMotion [local sensor, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + three.js ‚Äî no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps** (`three@^0.182.0` already in package.json).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 404/405/406/407); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8efb487` = cycle 407 `564-piano-splat-cathedral` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **564**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **565/566/567** to three builders (verified free; the ¬ß407 banked-seed slugs 562/563 left untouched as text).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß408):** WebSearch across real-time browser audio-visual + kids face/expression interaction, June 2026. Surfaced **Aalap Davjekar, "I Turned My Browser into a Visual Synthesizer" (Medium, May 2026)** ‚Äî a full in-browser visual synth at 60 fps driving MediaPipe selfie-segmentation silhouette + spring-physics typography off live FFT mic data; current-month, client-buildable, genuinely surprising as an *architecture* (segmentation + audio + physics composited per-frame in a browser). **But it binds cleanly to a camera-BODY/silhouette piece ‚Äî the exact lane the jury flagged as trodden (and the lane this kids cycle deliberately avoided)** ‚Äî so I do NOT claim #5 for today's build; logged honestly as a future-prototype seed (a "your shadow is a creature painted by your own voice's spectrum" piece). Also confirmed **MediaPipe Face is NOT a lab-first** (grep: `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `423-kids-face-beat` already use it), which killed a face-creature explorer's novelty edge before spawning. **Chain visible:** dive (no kids-appropriate <14-day technique that dodges the trodden camera-body lane) ‚Üí today's build leans on the diversity menu's *cross-modal off-glass* lane instead (accelerometer ‚Üí percussion), honestly NOT a research-bind cycle.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: WIDE** ‚Äî alternation (407 DEEP ‚Üí 408 WIDE) + Karel's standing "too similar" complaint ‚Üí three unrelated off-glass directions in one fire. JURY 2026-06-12 names NO kids spine to DEEP-extend (its kids note #6 = `518-living-ember`, already extended by `549` in cycle 402) ‚Üí the jury-naming-overrides-alternation rule does not fire ‚Üí WIDE stands.

- **Ambition floor (winner `566`): honest 3/5** ‚Äî `ambition: #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (DeviceMotion onset detection + Web Audio percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js character stage + drag fallback = 5) + #3 named reference that DRIVES the build (Brazilian batucada bloco ‚Äî the shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy: chocalho shimmer on top, surdo as the heavy bottom; the 16-step bed is a real batucada pattern; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body-rhythm philosophy)`. **#1 NOT claimed** ‚Äî accelerometer input (417-cradle, 553-tilt) and synth percussion both exist; the fresh element is *shake-acceleration ‚Üí percussion ensemble*, an interaction not a lab-first technique, framed honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** (the dive's bind is to the avoided camera-body lane; said plainly). INPUT: finger-on-glass family 3√ó (541/537/538), not ‚â•4; audio-file 2√ó (564/557). TECH: no core ‚â•4 (Gaussian-splat 2√ó). VIBE: kids 5√ó (structural, alternation); within-kids calm-sensory only 1√ó (541), not banned. The WIDE trio spread INPUT mic-sing/shake/camera-color √ó OUTPUT WebGL2/three.js/WebGL2 √ó TECH harmonizer/percussion-pool/hue-sonification ‚Äî three genuinely orthogonal off-glass directions.
- **Love-aware bias:** the loved kids rhythm/embodied cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`‚ù§Ô∏è ‚Äî rhythm play; `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚ù§Ô∏è, `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è ‚Äî device/physics play) softly backs a shake-driven percussion instrument; additive ‚Äî the diversity + ambition gates governed.

**Act ‚Äî WIDE fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, three orthogonal off-glass inputs √ó non-banned renderers; numbers pre-allocated 565/566/567; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`566-kids-shake-band` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî SHAKE (DeviceMotion) ‚Üí three.js ‚Üí Brazilian batucada dancing band.
- **`565-kids-sing-choir` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß408, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî MIC-sing live pitch ‚Üí raw-WebGL2 particle creatures ‚Üí Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer (you become the lead of a chord). Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~746, `audio.ts`, `pitch.ts`). **Lost on the DIVERSITY gate, not quality** ‚Äî its input is **mic**, exactly what the *immediately prior* kids cycle (406 clap-canon) used; repeating the previous kids cycle's primary modality is the "too similar" trap. Also the riskiest unverified surface (pitch detection on a breathy 4yo voice). The biggest *concept* of the trio ‚Äî resurrect the next time the diversity audit clears mic.
- **`567-kids-color-garden` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß408, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî rear CAMERA dominant-color ‚Üí raw-WebGL2 instanced glowing plants ‚Üí Scriabin hue‚Üípitch garden the real world grows. Complete + build-reviewed (`page.tsx` ~517, `audio.ts`, `vision.ts`, `render.ts` ~392). **Lost:** camera-color is thematically adjacent to the existing `368-kids-rainbow-quest` (foraging quest) and camera is the jury-flagged trodden input lane; also the most lighting-fragile for the hands-free glance.

**Curate ‚Äî why 566 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (3/5, #2+#3; no #5 bind honestly available for a kids cycle) and dodged the SVG ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **cross-cycle diversity / the "too similar" mandate** ‚Äî 565's mic input repeats cycle 406's exact modality, where 566's shake/accelerometer is distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs (mic @406, tilt @404); (2) **surprise + embodiment** (Karel's #2) ‚Äî the lab has never shipped a shake-driven percussion ensemble; the child's whole arm is the instrument, the most embodied of the three; (3) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** ‚Äî Karel reviews *on his phone*, so he can **literally shake it to play**, and the zero-permission auto-demo groove + bouncing orbs show a dancing band even with no sensor grant, where 565 needs the child to sing sustained pitch and 567 needs a rear camera + good lighting + colorful objects; (4) **answers jury #6 directly** ‚Äî an energetic dancing band breaks the calm-sensory-kids autopilot the jury flagged. 565 (the biggest concept ‚Äî resurrect when mic clears) + 567 (the off-the-couch explorer) banked as explicit resurrect paths.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß408 ‚Üí `rm -rf 565 567` (note: first `rm` attempt silently no-op'd because a prior `cd` into the 566 subfolder had persisted the shell cwd ‚Äî re-ran with absolute paths and confirmed via `git status`) ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `566-kids-shake-band/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ‚Äî status `completed` ‚Äî before removal, heeding ¬ß399/¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson) ‚Üí grep-scanned the winner for known ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers; both `as any` casts carry `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`; all `let`s genuinely reassigned; no `ts-nocheck`) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 92s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (444/444)`** (443‚Üí444 = the one new route), `/dream/566-kids-shake-band 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load` prerendered static (the larger First Load is three.js). **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` + older dream files; **zero** errors in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (566):** (a) **iOS motion-permission timing** ‚Äî `requestPermission()` must fire synchronously inside the click handler before the `await`; the code does this, but it's untested on real iOS hardware. (b) **accelerometer calibration** ‚Äî the magnitude tiers (3/9/18 m/s¬≤) are heuristic; the adaptive threshold (1.4√ó rolling avg, 3.5 floor) should compensate but a very calm phone sensor may need tuning (over/under-fire). (c) the groove scheduler is **`setTimeout`-based look-ahead, not the tightest sample-accurate `setInterval`+scheduleAhead** ‚Äî at 92 BPM it's fine for a demo but may drift slightly under heavy main-thread load. (d) **60 fps on low-end Android** ‚Äî the scene is light (5 meshes + 5 lights) but unprofiled on entry-level tablets. (e) `webkitAudioContext` path untested on old Safari; the README `<Link>` to `./README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission CSS auto-demo + always-on groove are the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a dancing band; **and since Karel reviews on his phone, he can shake it to actually play.**

**Queued next + why:**

## Cycle 407 ‚Äî 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (407 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `564-piano-splat-cathedral` ‚Äî **Cycle 2 of the splat spine, the "massively bigger concept": Karel's real Welcome Home piano doesn't just make a cloud ‚Äî it BUILDS A CATHEDRAL. A luminous Gothic nave of anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian splats ‚Äî floor ‚Üí columns ‚Üí arches ‚Üí transept ‚Üí vault ‚Üí rose window ‚Äî raised element-by-element by the music's onsets, lit by pitch, that you fly down the centre of. Stateful, not a loop: a floor + one column pair at second 10; the full vault and a blooming rose window by minute 3.**

**The build (winner `564`):** three subsystems + long-form state. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, 4 s timeout, looped) ‚Üí an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, hammer envelopes, diatonic/lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: spectral flux vs adaptive EMA ‚Üí onset; spectral peak ‚Üí pitch ‚Üí hue; energy ‚Üí loudness. (2) **Procedural cathedral geometry + build sequencer** (`cathedral.ts`) ‚Äî the nave is pre-generated at startup as typed-array splat positions/axes/radii for an ordered element list (floor 160 ¬∑ 5 column pairs 120 ea ¬∑ 5 arches 80 ea ¬∑ 2 transept arms 140 ea ¬∑ 4 vault bays 200 ea ¬∑ rose window 240 ¬∑ ambient 80); onsets raise the next element **in architectural order** (floor up, columns before arches before vault), permanent once raised, re-lit by later onsets ‚Äî so the piece is demonstrably different at minute 3 than second 10 (long-form state/memory, not a loop). (3) **Anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian-splat rasterizer (the cycle-2 technique leap)** ‚Äî each splat is an **oriented ellipse**, not 557's isotropic circle: per-splat world axes (`axisA/axisB`) aligned to its surface (column shaft = vertical flakes, arch = tangent flakes, vault = flat ceiling patches, rose = radial petals); the vertex shader projects the axis tips to screen space (EWA-style tip-projection, Zwicker 2001 ‚Äî a two-axis approximation, NOT full covariance) ‚Üí an oriented stretched quad; the fragment evaluates an elliptical Gaussian + a small additive emissive core for glow. **Every frame the live splats are depth-SORTED back-to-front by view-Z and composited with `gl.blendFunc(SRC_ALPHA, ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA)`, depth-test OFF** ‚Äî real alpha-over occlusion (a near column genuinely hides a far one), the correctness leap 557's additive-no-sort renderer lacked. Camera slowly flies forward down the nave + auto-rotate; orbit-on-drag + wheel zoom. **Pre-Begin auto-demo:** synthetic onsets build + light the cathedral from frame one, zero permission (the 06:30 hands-free phone-glance safety net); audio waits for the Begin gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET ‚Äî no side effects, no secrets, same pattern as 557/532/283). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 403/404/405/406); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `3c19de8` = cycle 406 `559-kids-clap-canon` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **559**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **562/563/564** to three builders (verified free; the ¬ß405/¬ß406 banked-seed slugs 556/558/560/561 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß407) ‚Äî a genuinely current-month well:** WebSearch across browser/real-time Gaussian splatting, June 2026. Found the consistent 2026 signal that **real-time, depth-SORTED, anisotropic (EWA-projected) 3DGS is now a phone-grade browser commodity** ‚Äî **SparseStreet** (arXiv 2606.03909, June 2026; ICMR '26 Jun 16‚Äì19), **MOBILE-GS** (ICLR 2026, 116 FPS sorted 3DGS on a phone), **WebSplatter** (arXiv 2602.03207, Feb 2026), Visionary (WebGPU full-GPU sort), antimatter15/splat (canonical CPU-sort WebGL). The bindable hook: 557 (cycle 1) deliberately took the cheap path ‚Äî **isotropic** billboards, **additive**, **no sort** (flat glow, no occlusion); the wave says the honest renderer is now affordable, so cycle 2's job is the **correctness leap to anisotropic + per-frame sorted alpha-over**. **Chain visible:** dive (2026 = sorted anisotropic 3DGS is browser-commodity; 557 took the cheap path) ‚Üí today's build leaps to the honest renderer AND arranges it into a buildable architecture.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ‚Äî alternation (406 WIDE ‚Üí 407 DEEP) + the orchestration guide's "one massive concept via parallel approaches." JURY 2026-06-12 #1 (the headline, 8 juries running) = "chase a 4/5 ‚Äî take a piece to cycle 2 AND bind a <14-day finding." 557 (¬ß405) landed the lab's FIRST honest 4/5 on the splat technique; the highest-value adult move is to make it *bigger*, not merely more correct ‚Üí DEEP cycle-2 of the splat spine. Three approaches attacked one concept (*his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic depth-sorted splat field*) via three forms/renderers.
- **Action = Build new (adult, odd cycle), advancing the splat spine to cycle 2.** No blocker, no in-progress adult thread whose output is over-represented.
- **Ambition floor (winner `564`): honest 3/5, 4/5 arguable** ‚Äî `ambition: #1 anisotropic + depth-SORTED alpha-over Gaussian-splat rendering (a technique the lab has NEVER rendered ‚Äî 557 was explicitly isotropic + additive + UNSORTED; contestable only because 564's anisotropy is a two-axis approximation, not full covariance ‚Äî discounted honestly) + #4 multi-cycle splat spine (cycle 2; cycle 3 = swap in 563's full EWA covariance) + #3 named refs that DRIVE it (Kerbl 3DGS SIGGRAPH 2023; Zwicker EWA 2001; antimatter15 CPU-sort; James Turrell architectural-light; Refik Anadol)`. **#5 soft/contestable** (the dive is genuinely current-month ‚Äî SparseStreet June 2026, MOBILE-GS ‚Äî and motivates the leap, but the rendering MATH is foundational, so I do NOT hard-claim it). **Plus a real extra signal the others lacked: long-form STATEFUL evolution** (the cathedral builds + is different at min 3 than sec 10 ‚Äî the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu lane). Floor rests cleanly on **#1 + #3 + #4 = 3/5**, honestly reported (no phantom 4/5). All three explorers cleared the floor identically; curation decided on surprise + concept-size + glance-robustness.
- **Diversity audit (last 10 prototypes 559/557/553/552/549/545/541/538/537/532):** OUTPUT **SVG = 4√ó** (559/552/549/538) ‚Üí **BANNED**. INPUT: finger-on-glass family 3√ó (541/538/537), not ‚â•4; audio-file 2√ó (557/532). TECH: no core ‚â•4 (Gaussian-splat only 557 in the last 10). VIBE: kids structural (alternation), no adult vibe ‚â•4. **Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, ONE concept ‚Äî *his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic, depth-sorted Gaussian-splat field* ‚Äî via three forms/renderers; numbers pre-allocated 562/563/564; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route):**
- **`564-piano-splat-cathedral` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî splats arranged into a Gothic cathedral the music BUILDS + you fly through; anisotropic two-axis + depth-sorted alpha-over; long-form stateful build.

Complete + build-reviewed (`splat-renderer.ts` ~28kB, all math hand-rolled). **Lost:** the cleanest #1-technique, but the *experience* is another orbitable glowing cloud (adjacent to 557's galaxy) where 564 is a categorically new experience. **The cycle-3 path: swap 564's two-axis approx for 563's full covariance ‚Üí a reconstruction-grade cathedral.**

Complete + build-reviewed (`splat.ts` ~22kB). **Lost:** also a "cloud you orbit," conceptually adjacent to 557; the *anisotropy-from-flow-tangent* trick is the keeper for any future ribbon splat piece.

**Curate ‚Äî why 564 won:** all three cleared the floor identically (#1+#3+#4, #5 soft) and dodged every ban, so the deciding axes were (1) **the "massively bigger CONCEPT" + Karel's standing "too similar in design and theme" complaint** ‚Äî 557 was already a glowing cloud you orbit; 562 (ribbons) and 563 (EWA cloud) both advance the RENDERER but keep the same cloud EXPERIENCE, while 564 is a categorically different experience (a *building* his music raises, that you fly through) ‚Äî the directest answer to "stop shipping variants, ship massively bigger concepts"; (2) **an extra ambition axis the others lack ‚Äî long-form STATEFUL evolution** (the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu): the cathedral assembles floor‚Üívault‚Üírose-window over minutes and is genuinely different at min 3 than sec 10; (3) **glance-robustness for the 06:30 hands-free phone review** ‚Äî a recognizable cathedral assembling itself reads instantly at a 10-s glance where an abstract splat cloud is ambiguous, and 564's deterministic pre-generated geometry is the least numerically fragile (563's full-EWA conics carry degenerate-splat risk). 563 (the reconstruction-grade renderer) + 562 (the ribbon renderer) banked as the splat-spine's alternate renderers + the explicit cycle-3 path.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß407 ‚Üí `rm -rf 562 563` ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `564-piano-splat-cathedral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified (no loser folders; all three builder agents had COMPLETED ‚Äî status `completed`, not running ‚Äî before removal, heeding ¬ß399/¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson) ‚Üí grep-scanned the winner for the known ESLint traps (no `use[A-Z]` helpers, no `WebGL2RenderingContext | null` narrowing trap, no api route, README link present) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 45s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (443/443)`** (442‚Üí443 = the one new route), `/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral 8.48 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static. **Clean first run ‚Äî no fix attempt needed** (the builder reported zero TS errors on its own pass). ## Cycle 406 ‚Äî 2026-06-13 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (406 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 orthogonal off-glass explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `559-kids-clap-canon` ‚Äî **Steve Reich's phasing, for a 4-year-old: clap a rhythm into the mic, two friendly blobs clap it back, then one drifts ~1.8% faster so the patterns slide unison ‚Üí shimmering interlock ‚Üí unison over ~30‚Äì40 s; a big phase-wheel with two chasing dots makes the drift VISIBLE. The jury's #4 "time-tension piece ‚Äî but it had no children" answered literally.**

**The build (winner `559`):** four subsystems. (1) **mic clap/onset detection** ‚Äî `getUserMedia({audio})` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); per-rAF time-domain RMS vs a fast-attack/slow-decay EMA background; onset fires when `rms > max(0.015, ema¬∑2.5)` with a 120 ms refractory; 2‚Äì6 detected claps ‚Üí an inter-onset-interval array (a ~2 s silence commits; <2 claps ‚Üí a default Reich-style 6-clap pattern so it ALWAYS works). (2) **phase-canon scheduler** ‚Äî two voices share the IOI array; voice B's interval √ó `(1‚àí0.018)` = ~1.8% shorter loop; a 25 ms `setInterval` schedules sample-accurate `start(t)` 120 ms ahead (look-ahead, no `setTimeout`-per-note). Voice A = warm bandpass-noise clap + low sine body; voice B = bright highpass woodblock + triangle tone. (3) **SVG render via direct rAF attribute mutation** (no per-frame React `setState`) ‚Äî the phase-wheel dots, character body-scale, glow opacity, hand positions all `setAttribute`'d each frame; React state only for discrete UI (clap count, phase word). (4) **character animation** ‚Äî two cute SVG blob-creatures (ellipses + eyes + hands) flash/scale on each scheduled clap (decay 6√ó/s), `feGaussianBlur` glow pulse. Master `gain(0.75) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí10 dBFS, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **Hands-free auto-demo:** the phase-wheel + blobs animate from frame one with a built-in pattern (sin-driven flashes) at zero clicks (audio waits for the Start gesture); cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Mic-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + tap-anywhere clap fallback** (fully playable). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG ‚Äî no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 385/399/403/404/405); local stale at alt-lineage `2e98f5e` (cycle 305), origin authoritative at `8bea2f4` = cycle 405 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **557**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **559/560/561** to three builders (verified free; the ¬ß405 banked-seed slugs 556/558 left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß406):** WebSearch across (a) children's music interaction √ó body-tracking √ó WebGPU June 2026 and (b) collaborative kids music-making. Surfaced a real platform-level note ‚Äî **a usable WebGPU baseline now shipped to all major browsers via the Interop 2026 project** (verified 2026, recent) ‚Äî but that's a *platform* fact, not a bindable *technique*, and kids WebGPU is already in the lab (518/520/541). No kid-appropriate, client-buildable, genuinely <14-day technique surfaced; cs.SD remains server-ML (the honest read carried since ¬ß386). **#5 NOT claimed**, said plainly. The structural read holds (¬ß404): at ~360+ kids prototypes the easy kids lab-firsts are spent, so a kids cycle competes on **ambition + diversity + execution + a named-concept that's new TO CHILDREN**, not a thin first-X. **Chain visible:** dive (no <14-day kids bind; the jury's #4 names an entire tension vocabulary ‚Äî Reich phase, tempo canons ‚Äî that "had no children") ‚Üí today's build brings Reich phasing to a 4-year-old.

## Cycle 405 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (405 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `557-piano-splat-galaxy` ‚Äî **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES. The lab's FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer: every note of Karel's real Welcome Home piano BIRTHS a bloom of glowing Gaussian splats, so his performance accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit ‚Äî onsets are bursts, sustained notes drift into nebula, pitch paints the color, phrasing draws the arms.**

**The build (winner `557`):** three subsystems. (1) **Audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch detection** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî on the Begin gesture, `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode: JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, `decodeAudioData`, looped) with a 4 s timeout ‚Üí an always-on **synth-piano fallback** (warm partials, soft hammer envelopes, overlapping C-lydian arpeggios with clear onsets) so it ALWAYS sounds offline; master chain ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Per frame: **spectral flux** (positive bin-to-bin increases) vs an adaptive EMA threshold ‚Üí onset; spectral peak ‚Üí dominant pitch ‚Üí hue; energy ‚Üí loudness; centroid ‚Üí brightness. (2) **Generative bloom particle system** (`splat.ts`, CPU pool) ‚Äî an onset spawns ~80‚Äì300 splats from a point on a slowly-growing ring (arms, not a blob) with outward shell velocities; loudness ‚Üí count+size, brightness ‚Üí tight core vs diffuse; a ~13k-splat typed-array pool integrates each frame (Euler + drag + cheap curl-noise turbulence + differential galactic shear) and recycles oldest. (3) **Raw WebGL2 additive Gaussian-splat rasterizer + orbit cam** (`splat.ts`, GPU) ‚Äî one unit quad via `drawArraysInstanced`; per-instance pos/color/size/alpha via `bufferSubData`; vertex shader billboards each quad to face the camera; fragment shader radial Gaussian `alpha = exp(-4¬∑dot(uv,uv))`; **additive blending** (`SRC_ALPHA, ONE`), depth test OFF ‚Üí order-independent (no depth sort ‚Üí robust + glowing); hand-rolled `mat4` perspective+lookAt, slow auto-rotate. Pre-Begin, synthetic blooms keep the galaxy alive and turning (the 06:30 hands-off safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET ‚Äî no side effects, no secrets, the same pattern as 283/532/165). **No new npm deps.**

## Cycle 404 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (404 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `553-kids-tilt-fountain` ‚Äî **A 4-year-old TIPS the whole tablet to pour a stream of glowing orbs down through a 3D vertical garden of chimes, bells, and strings ‚Äî composing a singing waterfall by where they aim the flow. Tilt left/right/forward steers the cascade; each instrument-zone the orbs fall through rings a warm pentatonic note. Active, constructive play ‚Äî you AIM and BUILD a tune ‚Äî not another calm glow toy.**

**The build (winner `553`):** four interlocked subsystems + auto-demo. (1) **Tilt input + gravity model** ‚Äî `deviceorientation` (gamma=left/right, beta=front/back) ‚Üí a smoothed (EMA Œ±‚âà0.08) 2D gravity vector applied to every orb; gravity never reverses (gy stays down). iOS 13+ permission via `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` on the Start gesture; desktop fallback = pointer X/Y ‚Üí gravity + arrow keys ‚Üí incremental steer; denied/absent ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + pointer fallback auto-activated. (2) **Orb physics + emitter** (`physics.ts`) ‚Äî a continuous emitter drips one orb / 100 ms from the top; Euler integration under the tilt-gravity; per-orb **AABB collision** against 5 instrument zones; **hard cap 180 live orbs**, retire at >12 s or below the floor, pool recycled each frame (no unbounded growth), slight drag (0.985) prevents runaway. *Discrete rigid orbs that trigger notes on contact ‚Äî NOT a simulated fluid/field whose statistics are sonified (the jury-banned GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone move).* (3) **Zone-based spatial pentatonic synth** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî 5 zones each a distinct timbre (bell = sine+partials; string = Karplus-ish noise-burst+resonant bandpass; chime = triangle√ó1.5+overtone; marimba; low-bell); pitch varies by horizontal hit position; all C-major-pentatonic (always consonant, kid-safe); per-zone rate-limiting; master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí10 dBFS, 20:1) ‚Üí destination` brick-wall limiter; `setTargetAtTime` envelopes; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js render** ‚Äî additive-emissive glowing orbs, 5 luminous zone-panels that flash when struck, dark Resonance background, glow via additive blending (no postprocessing dep); geometries/materials/renderer disposed on unmount. **Ghost-tilt auto-demo** ‚Äî a figure-8 synthetic tilt pours orbs + sings from frame one with zero permission/zero taps; cancels on real tilt/pointer; resumes after ~4 s idle (the 06:30 hands-free glance safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js ‚Äî no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** + local diverged 50/50 (`--ff-only` aborted ‚Äî the recurring container-drift, same as 363/368/371/376/385/403); local stale at an alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `1046d84` = cycle 403 `552-dream-house` ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (max committed dream folder on disk **552**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **553/554/555** to three builders (verified free; 550/551 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 403, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß404):** WebSearch across (a) **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker/blendshapes for realtime browser** ‚Äî mature/foundational (52 blendshapes, `@mediapipe/tasks-vision`), NOT <14 days, and **grep-verified already used twice** (`258-kids-mirror-pets` melody, `423-kids-face-beat` percussion) ‚Üí face/expression music is the kids *autopilot* the jury warned against, so it was **dropped**; (b) **Bileam Tschepe/elekktronaut TouchDesigner** ‚Äî freshest uploads are POPs tutorials Jan-2026 (~5 months), nothing <14 days and TD-POPs don't port to a 4yo's iPad. **#5 NOT claimable** (no <14-day kid-appropriate client-buildable finding; cs.SD still server-ML, carried since ¬ß386) ‚Äî said plainly, the ninth jury running. **The honest structural read:** at ~360+ kids prototypes the easy kids lab-firsts are spent (Hands 524, Face 258/423, Pose 419/268/295, voice‚Üípitch 549, tilt-marble 169/184, echo-canon 142, boids 537, GPU-fluid 541) ‚Äî so a kids cycle competes on **ambition + diversity + execution** (the 537/549 precedent: clear the floor via #2+#3, ship a BIGGER/more orthogonal concept), not a thin first-X. **Chain visible:** dive (face = kids autopilot ‚Üí drop it; easy #1s spent ‚Üí compete on ambition+diversity) ‚Üí a WIDE three-explorer kids fire dodging every jury ban.

(c) **whether the cascade actually reads as "composing a tune"** ‚Äî the core unverified claim is that aiming the flow at different zones feels like deliberate melody-making vs pretty randomness (the zone layout + pitch-by-position is designed for it, but only a real child's hands confirm it). ## Cycle 403 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (403 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `552-dream-house` ‚Äî **The xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE: a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / Bohlen‚ÄìPierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump (never returns home), and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1 ‚Äî zero permission, runs itself.** Cycle 2 of the **Xenharmonic Drone** spine (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named: *"capped at 3 only because it's a one-off ‚Äî make it a spine and it's the first 4"*). 538 was something you *tap*; 552 is a room you *leave running*.

**The build (winner `552`):** (1) **autonomous lattice walker** ‚Äî steps a neighbor (u¬±1 fifths / v¬±1 thirds) every 4‚Äì8 s, biased toward unvisited nodes; the **syntonic comma (81/80 ‚âà 21.5¬¢)** guarantees loops never reclose, so the pitch drifts permanently. (2) **sustained pure-ratio drone** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî current node + 2‚Äì5 nearest neighbors held as a chord at EXACT rational ratios (never 12-TET); each voice = sine + 3rd/5th odd partials + a ~0.07 Hz detune-LFO shimmer; all attacks/releases via `setTargetAtTime` (3‚Äì4 s TCs) so chords never hard-start ("Dream House" crossfade); voice pooling, per-voice gain `0.55/voiceCount`, **8-voice hard cap**, full osc/LFO cleanup on retire. (3) **the long-form arc (the headline)** ‚Äî an 8-phase ~14-min cycle (gathering‚Üíascending‚Üíflowering‚Üítritave‚Üíradiance‚Üídissolving‚Üíreceding‚Üístillness) smoothstep-interpolating **density** (2‚Üî6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700‚Üî4800 Hz), a **¬±0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JI‚ÜíB‚ÄìP‚Üí19-EDO‚Üíback) ‚Äî so minute 12 differs from minute 1 in register, density, tuning-world, brightness AND absolute (comma-drifted) frequency. (4) **SVG Tonnetz render** ‚Äî nodes positioned by (u,v), active chord nodes glowing via `feGaussianBlur`, a **comet-trail** polyline of the walker's path + accumulating dim **visited-ghost dots** (VISIT_MAX=300) so the pilgrimage is *visible*; viewBox pans smoothly to follow the walker; rAF mutates SVG attributes directly (no per-frame React churn); HUD shows tuning, root ratio, voice count, **elapsed clock + phase word**. Optional **tap = "exhale"** (fade current chord, bloom a fresh region) ‚Äî purely additive; doing nothing is the default. Master `gain ‚Üí drifting lowpass ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(20:1, ‚àí10 dBFS) ‚Üí destination`; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚Äî no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at a cycle-305 alt-lineage `2e98f5e`, origin authoritative at `e346ad4` = cycle 402 `549-kids-song-friend`); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `e346ad4`; max committed dream folder on disk **549**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **550/551/552** to three builders (verified free; 544/546/547/548 are banked-seed slugs from cycles 401/402, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß403):** WebSearch across arxiv cs.SD/cs.GR June 5‚Äì12 2026 + microtonal/JI tuning interfaces. **arxiv cs.SD this window has ZERO just-intonation/microtonal/pitch papers** ‚Äî it's LLM-jamming (2606.11886) + Bach generation (2606.13626) + deepfake/TTS, i.e. still server-side ML, the recurring honest read ‚Üí **#5 NOT claimable** (no <14-day client-buildable finding), said plainly. The dive DID surface a genuinely-relevant recent interface ‚Äî **LIMITER: A Gamified Interface for Harnessing Just Intonation Systems** (arXiv 2507.08675, **July 2025** ‚Äî verified date, ~11 months, NOT <14 days) ‚Äî usable as a *named reference* (#3) and as backing for "make JI navigable/embodied," but honestly not a #5 bind. **Chain visible:** dive (cs.SD = server-ML, #5 unbindable; JURY names 538 to spine-ify; the JI-interface literature backs "make the lattice a place you move through, not tap") ‚Üí today's build.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ‚Äî JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly names a piece to make a spine ("make 538 a spine and it's the first 4"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (overrides the 402-was-DEEP‚ÜíWIDE alternation; the jury naming wins). (Web MIDI checked as a possible #1 ‚Üí 12 files already use `requestMIDIAccess`, NOT a lab-first; tilt + voice also well-used ‚Äî no clean #1 in any steering approach.)
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ finger-on-glass INPUT (7√ó) ¬∑ calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√ó)] ¬∑ picked(552) = [**none / autonomous INPUT** (off-glass ‚Äî the purest dodge of the 7√ó finger-on-glass reflex; the jury's #3 dared exactly the non-finger/leave-it-running lane; "none" ran only 3√ó in the window, NOT banned) ¬∑ **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU ‚Äî both banned at 4√ó; and NOT three.js, which `545` just shipped 2 cycles ago) ¬∑ **JI-lattice-walk ‚Üí sustained-pure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU-physics drone ‚Äî the banned meta-technique; the sound source is a tuning lattice, not a sim) ¬∑ **La-Monte-Young / xenharmonic / hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` ‚Äî **clean on every jury ban**, and it takes the jury's #3 "leave it running, off the glass" dare head-on.
