**Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept ‚Äî *the xenharmonic lattice as a living, self-drifting, off-glass-steerable Dream House drone-pilgrimage* ‚Äî via three steering attacks; all share an autonomous-by-default core, comma-pump drift, sustained pure-ratio drone, SVG Tonnetz + comet-trail):** `552-dream-house` (pure autonomous long-form ~14-min arc ‚Äî **WINNER**) ¬∑ `550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage` (VOICE-steered: autocorrelation pitch ‚Üí nearest-node pull, "tune yourself into the drift" ‚Äî complete, the most *musical/embodied*, lost: builder honestly flagged the autocorrelation detector as basic [octave-confusion/noise] ‚Üí least-reliable steering, and 552 is more glance-robust) ¬∑ `551-tilt-pilgrimage` (TILT-steered: iOS-permission deviceorientation ‚Üí fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad fallback ‚Äî complete, the most *physical*, lost: needs the iOS permission dance + a real device, a steering layer not a bigger swing). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬ß403** seeds (the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers).

**Curate ‚Äî why 552 won:** all three are the same living-Dream-House concept; the deciding axes were (1) **glance-robustness** ‚Äî 552 needs ZERO permission and evolves on its own, so the 06:30 hands-free phone glance always shows a wandering glowing lattice + a slowly-transforming pure-ratio drone; 550 needs mic (and its detector is weak), 551 needs tilt permission + a real device. (2) **the jury's own #3 dare** ‚Äî "take the 0√ó non-screen / leave-it-running lane ‚Ä¶ prove the screen bias can break" ‚Äî 552's autonomous long-form form is the most direct answer of the three. (3) **the bigger swing** ‚Äî a genuine 14-min stateful arc (the manual's "long-form generative: state, memory, evolution, NOT loops") is the most ambitious of the three and the only clean #1-*attempt*; voice/tilt are steering layers bolted onto the same core. (4) **build robustness** ‚Äî solid voice-pooling + gain-capping + brick-wall limiter, reviewed in `audio.ts`. 550 (voice grab-the-wheel) + 551 (tilt grab-the-wheel) banked as the explicit cycle-3 path.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß403 ‚Üí `rm -rf 550 551` ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `552-dream-house/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 29.5s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (439/439)`** (438‚Üí439 = the one new route), `.next/server/app/dream/552-dream-house/page.js` confirmed prerendered. Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*` files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio device in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (552):** (a) **does minute 12 actually FEEL different from minute 1** ‚Äî the arc is structurally sound (8 interpolated phases + tuning migration + register breath), but whether the perceptual journey lands over a real 14-min listen is the core unverified claim; the HUD phase-word/clock is the legibility crutch for a short glance. (b) **long-run gain / limiter interaction** ‚Äî voice gain is mathematically capped (`0.55/voiceCount`, 8-voice cap) and brick-walled, but a 20+ min session's compressor-release behavior isn't stress-tested. (c) **iOS AudioContext suspend on screen-lock** ‚Äî `ctx.resume()` is not wired to a tap-to-resume guard (the builder's own flagged risk); a long unattended phone session could suspend. (d) extreme octave-folded frequencies at far lattice positions (clamped 80‚Äì520 Hz √ó register-shift, but perceptual balance unauditioned). (e) the README `<Link>` to `/dream/552-dream-house/README.md` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). Because it's fully autonomous with zero permission, the 06:30 glance reliably shows a drifting, glowing, singing pilgrimage with no setup ‚Äî the strongest glance-safety of any recent piece.

## Cycle 402 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (402 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `549-kids-song-friend` ‚Äî **A creature whose body is literally MADE of the songs a child sings it ‚Äî it remembers the actual melodies (not a vague energy, not a timer) forever across calendar days, and sings them back, woven and changed, every visit.** Cycle 2 of the kids **Companion / Presence** spine (`518-kids-living-ember` = cycle 1): 518 remembered only humming *energy* within one session; here the friend remembers musical *content* across days and you can SEE it ‚Äî each song is a petal whose shape traces its pitch contour.

**The build (winner `549`):** (1) **forgiving voice‚Üípitch capture** ‚Äî `getUserMedia` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` ‚Üí autocorrelation pitch detector tuned for a 4-year-old's high, breathy, wandering voice (clarity threshold + **babble-note fallback** so any vocalization still teaches a note); snaps to **C-major pentatonic** ~2 octaves; a melody = note-index array (cap 12; a ~1.2 s pause commits the song). (2) **cross-day melodic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`) ‚Äî `localStorage` (`resonance.dream.549`, try/catch): song library + visit count + monotonic `totalNotesEver` + `lastVisit` + simulated `day`; on load the friend GREETS ("you came back!"), is visibly bigger, and surfaces a new-calendar-day return. (3) **recall re-synthesis** (`audio.ts`) ‚Äî never raw playback: transpose + gently slow + **weave two different days' melodies** into soft counterpoint; warm pentatonic voice; kid-safe master `gain ‚Üí lowpass 8 kHz ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, ‚àí10 dBFS) ‚Üí destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **the body IS the songs (SVG)** ‚Äî each remembered song is a petal/teardrop path whose vertical shape traces that melody's pitch contour, pentatonic degree ‚Üí hue; a friendly face (blinking eyes, mouth that opens when it sings, the active petal pulses on each recalled note); idle breathing via direct rAF attribute mutation (no per-frame React re-render); `feGaussianBlur` glow. **Two demo affordances** (the reviewer can't wait until tomorrow): pre-seeded "yesterday's songs" so it sings hands-free from frame one with zero permission, AND an honestly-labelled **"‚ú® pretend it's tomorrow"** button that bumps the visit, regrows the body, and plays a transposed/slowed/woven recall instantly. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded] + Web Audio + SVG ‚Äî no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `01af318` = cycle 401 `545-motion-loom`); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `01af318`; max committed dream folder on disk **545**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **547/548/549** to three builders (verified free; 544/546 are banked-seed slugs from cycle 401, left untouched).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß402):** WebSearch across arxiv cs.SD (still server-side singing-synthesis ML ‚Äî the recurring honest read, #5 unclaimable from that well) and the kids voice-companion literature. Surfaced one genuinely-relevant fresh-ish finding ‚Äî a **2026 AccScience study** on children's *developmental* preferences for natural vs. synthetic voice agents (132 kids aged 4‚Äì10; willingness-to-interact rises when the agent feels like a known, responsive presence). **#5 NOT claimed** ‚Äî "online-first 2026" date isn't verifiably <14 days, said plainly ‚Äî but it backs the design decision that a young child's bond with a voice companion deepens through *memory of content* (it knows your songs) rather than novelty, which is exactly 549's thesis and the differentiator from the timer-aged `322-kids-voice-garden`. **Chain visible:** dive (kids bond deepens via remembered content, not a clock; jury #6 names 518 to extend) ‚Üí today's build.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ‚Äî JURY 2026-06-12 provocation **#6 explicitly names a kids piece to extend** ("518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days ‚Äî extend THAT ‚Äî a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 401-was-DEEP‚ÜíWIDE alternation; the jury naming a piece wins). ONE concept (a creature that remembers your *songs* across days) attacked via three render/embodiment approaches.
- **Action = Build new / spine-extension (kids, even cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress thread; the jury's kids-set ask IS the action.
- **Ambition floor (winner `549`): 3/5 solid** ‚Äî `ambition: #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (voice/pitch capture + cross-day localStorage memory + recall re-synthesis + SVG contour-body = 4) + #3 named refs (Tamagotchi ‚Äî Aki Maita / Bandai 1996, the original persistent companion; Brian Eno long-form non-repeating) + #4 multi-cycle (Companion/Presence spine, cycle 2 ‚Äî the jury's #6 ask)`. **#1 made honestly as the contestable case** ‚Äî "remembering melodic *content* across calendar days, recalled as woven counterpoint, with the body literally drawn from the contours" is a genuine interaction-first for the lab, but **localStorage persistence itself is NOT lab-first** (`322-kids-voice-garden` already persists a calendar-aged creature; `71-shader-evolve` persists a gallery) ‚Äî so #1 discounts cleanly and the floor rests on #2+#3+#4. **#5 NOT claimed** (AccScience date not verifiably <14 days).
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ finger-on-glass INPUT (7√ó) ¬∑ calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√ó)] ¬∑ picked(549) = [**voice/mic INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger ‚Äî the jury's most-over-represented reflex at 7√ó) ¬∑ **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU ‚Äî both banned at 4√ó; and decisively NOT three.js, which `545` just shipped, so a three.js sibling would be 2-in-a-row) ¬∑ **pitch-detection‚Üípersistent-memory‚Üírecall TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone) ¬∑ **companion / relationship / it-remembers-you VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids ‚Äî the differentiator is the bond/memory, exactly jury #6's point)]` ‚Äî **clean on every jury ban.**
- **Love-aware bias:** Karel's loved kids/voice cluster softly backs it ‚Äî `158-kids-hum-paint`‚ù§Ô∏è, `322`-adjacent voice play, `100-kids-paint-song`‚ù§Ô∏è, `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚ù§Ô∏è (a child's voice/mark becoming a visible thing); additive ‚Äî the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick.

**Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated builders, one concept ‚Äî *a creature made of the songs you sing it, remembered across days* ‚Äî via three render attacks):** `549-kids-song-friend` (SVG body literally drawn from melodic contours + a face ‚Äî **WINNER**) ¬∑ `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js glowing creature, each song an orbiting contour-strand ‚Äî complete, richest idle presence, lost on diversity: three.js 2-in-a-row + less legible than petals-with-a-face) ¬∑ `548-kids-songbloom` (raw WebGL2 GLSL bioluminescent shader grown from memory-seed uniforms ‚Äî complete, the freshest generative-shader-from-memory idea, lost: memory‚Üíuniform-hash is the *least legible* "see your own songs," no face/character). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬ß402** seeds.

**Curate ‚Äî why 549 won:** all three are the same "remembers your songs across days, sings them back woven" concept; the deciding axes were (1) **kid-legibility** ‚Äî 549's petals-each-tracing-a-song on a creature with a face is the most *concrete, readable* expression of "made of your songs" for a 4-year-old; 547's orbiting strands are more abstract and 548's shader-hash is the least readable connection between *this song* and *that shape*. (2) **diversity by the jury's own mechanical audit** ‚Äî SVG dodges the banned Canvas2D/WebGPU AND avoids a 2nd-consecutive three.js (545 just shipped it); 547 would have repeated the renderer. (3) **companion VIBE fidelity** (jury #6) ‚Äî a face that greets you and sings reads as a *relationship*; a full-screen shader (548) reads as an ambience. 547 + 548 banked.

**Validate:** banked both losers to IDEAS ¬ß402 ‚Üí `rm -rf 547 548` ‚Üí re-verified `git status` shows ONLY `549-kids-song-friend/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` (heeding ¬ß401's premature-completion-race lesson: both loser agents had COMPLETED and their folders were confirmed gone before the build) ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY the winner ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully`, `‚úì Generating static pages (438/438)`, `/dream/549-kids-song-friend 5.75 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static.** Build warnings are all pre-existing in unrelated files; **zero** in the winner folder. `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (549):** (a) **pitch accuracy on a REAL 4-year-old's voice is the core unknown** ‚Äî autocorrelation is octave-error-prone and a child's voice is breathy/noisy; the clarity threshold + babble-note fallback + pentatonic snapping hide a lot, but the capture timings (`silenceRms`, `MIN_NOTE_GAP`, the 1.2 s commit pause) want field tuning. (b) **SVG perf with a large library** ‚Äî each song adds a multi-point teardrop path under a `feGaussianBlur`; petal count is unbounded (note cap is 12/song, growth is bounded) so a child with dozens of songs over weeks could stress an old iPad's blur filter ‚Äî a cycle-3 cap/LOD is the obvious hardening. (c) the README `<Link>` points at `/dream/549-kids-song-friend/README.md` which 404s as a route (cosmetic, a lab-wide pattern ‚Äî does not break the build). (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) the single `rafRef` is shared between idle-breathing and listening effects ‚Äî only one is ever live and unmount cancels it, but the dual ownership is slightly fragile. The pre-seeded memory + "pretend it's tomorrow" button are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a friend made of songs, greeting + singing, and visibly growing ‚Äî with zero permission and no 24h wait.

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 403 (adult, odd):** alternation says WIDE next (402 was DEEP), unless the next jury again names a piece. The jury's standing ask is the **4/5 chase** ‚Äî take `545`/`514` polytempo OR `538` xenharmonic to a further cycle AND bind a genuinely <14-day finding in the same fire (the #4+#5 stack the lab has missed for seven juries).

## Cycle 401 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (401 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `545-motion-loom` ‚Äî **The MOTION IN A ROOM conducts a Nancarrow polytempo canon: the left and right halves of the camera each carry their own moving rhythm ‚Äî extracted with NO machine learning, just optical motion energy ‚Äî and because two real-world motions never lock to a clean tempo ratio, the canon drifts forever and CANNOT be conducted into agreement.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` (the piece JURY 2026-06-12 explicitly named to extend): 514's five voices ran at *composer-chosen* fixed irrational ratios; here the two master tempi are **conducted by the room itself**, off the glass.

**The build:** (1) **no-ML motion extraction** ‚Äî `getUserMedia` ‚Üí hidden 64√ó48 offscreen canvas ‚Üí per-pixel luma frame-difference accumulated for the LEFT vs RIGHT frame halves (two "conductors"), one motion-energy scalar per half per frame (no neural net / MediaPipe / WASM). (2) **autocorrelation tempo** ‚Äî each half's motion-energy buffers ~6 s; mean-subtracted autocorrelation finds the dominant lag in 40‚Äì170 BPM ‚Üí BPM, smoothed (œÑ‚âà1.5 s), **never quantized** so the two tempi form an irrational ratio by default. (3) **polytempo canon engine** ("A Tale of Two Clocks," Wilson 2013) ‚Äî 5 voices, 0‚Äì1 on conductor A (√ó1, √ó1/‚àö2), 2‚Äì4 on B (√ó1, √ó1/œÜ, √óœÜ/2); 25 ms `setInterval` + 120 ms lookahead, sample-accurate `osc.start(t)`; D-pentatonic 2-octave (zero harmonic tension ‚Äî all drama metric); sine+2.756√ó bell timbre; master `gain ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall (20:1, ‚àí12 dBFS) ‚Üí destination; AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext||webkitAudioContext`). (4) **three.js loom** ‚Äî 5 glowing `THREE.Line` threads whose vertices are BPM-phase-driven sinusoids (the visual drift IS the tempo drift) + 160 pooled node-pulse spheres on beat-onsets + slow camera orbit + Ikeda violet/blue/emerald/cyan/purple on #020208 + HTML readouts "Left X BPM / Right Y BPM / ratio Z‚Ä¶ ‚Äî never rational"; full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-motion auto-demo:** two synthetic motion signals at A‚âà72 / B‚âà72‚àö2 BPM weave + drift from frame one with zero permission; room takes over on detected motion; resumes after ~4 s still. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: Web Audio + camera [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + three.js ‚Äî no mic, no secrets, no network writes). **No new npm deps** (`three`@0.182 already installed, imported normally ‚Äî not CDN, not added).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged AGAIN (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to `bad6b3f` = "jury: verdict 2026-06-12", with cycle 400 `541-kids-liquid-light` at `49b29f7` just beneath it); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `bad6b3f`; max committed dream folder on disk **541**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (**exit 0 on the FIRST try this cycle**, 1455 pkgs; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **544/545/546** to three builders (verified free; **skipped 542/543** to avoid reusing last cycle's banked-slug numbers, per the established pattern).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß401):** WebSearch across arxiv beat-tracking (only 2017‚Äì2022, server/RNN-side), conducting-gesture‚Üítempo ("visual beats" = max velocity/acceleration of the ictus; foundational), and **spontaneous-motor-tempo science** (biorxiv 2025.09.14 "From Individual to Shared Tempo" + 2025.09.16 "Similarity in Spontaneous Tempo Impacts Flow ‚Ä¶ Joint Performance"). **#5 honestly NOT bindable** ‚Äî the SMT papers are the most *relevant* freshness in months (far more than this week's server-ML cs.SD) but at **~9 months they aren't <14 days**; said plainly even after heeding JURY provocation #5's "mine beyond cs.SD." The actionable bind is a *jury-named* one: JURY 2026-06-12 named **514 to take to cycle 2** + provocation #4 asked for a **conducted tempo-canon where gestures set incommensurable tempi**, and the SMT science supplies the scientific WHY (two bodies' innate tempi rarely match ‚Üí the drift is an irreducible human condition, not a composer's trick). **Chain visible:** dive (jury names 514 + #4 ‚Üí SMT grounds *why* two bodies can't agree ‚Üí no-ML motion‚Üítempo as the off-glass / off-Canvas2D-WebGPU / off-physics-drone attack) ‚Üí today's build.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **mode: DEEP** ‚Äî JURY.md (read FIRST, per the manual) explicitly names a piece to extend ("take 514-polytempo-loom ‚Ä¶ to cycle 2"), which the orchestration guide says = go DEEP on X (this overrides the 400-was-DEEP‚ÜíWIDE alternation; the jury naming wins). ONE concept (a conducted polytempo canon) attacked via three input√órender approaches.
- **Action = Build new / spine-extension (adult, odd cycle).** No blocker, no in-progress thread; the jury's headline ask IS the action.
- **Ambition floor (winner `545`): 3/5 solid, honest case for 4/5** ‚Äî `ambition: #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (no-ML motion extraction + autocorrelation tempo + polytempo canon engine + three.js loom = 4) + #3 named refs (Conlon Nancarrow, *Studies for Player Piano* / Study 40 "Transcendental" e:œÄ "probably never aligns" ‚Äî Kyle Gann; Ryoji Ikeda; autocorrelation tempo-induction; spontaneous-motor-tempo science) + #4 multi-cycle (514 polytempo spine, cycle 2 ‚Äî the jury's #1 ask)`. **#1 flagged honestly as a cross-modal/application first** (first tempo/rhythm EXTRACTION from camera motion ‚Äî the lab has audio-onset/beat detection from the MIC at 106/147 and pitch-autocorrelation/YIN at 507, but has **never derived a beat-RATE from visual motion**; genuine and grep-checked, but an application of a known technique, not a brand-new primitive ‚Äî so it discounts cleanly to 3/5 if the jury disagrees, and the headline 4/5-chase is made *honestly* rather than gamed). **#5 NOT claimed** (SMT papers ~9 months, not <14 days; said plainly).
- **Diversity audit (JURY 2026-06-12 rolling-15 bans, applied):** `banned = [WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ GPU-physics-sim‚Üídrone TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ finger-on-glass INPUT (7√ó) ¬∑ calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4√ó)] ¬∑ picked(545) = [**camera-motion INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger, NOT ML) ¬∑ **three.js OUTPUT** (1√ó‚Üí2√ó, the scarcest non-banned renderer ‚Äî and decisively NOT SVG, which is already 3√ó and a sibling-ship would have pushed to 4√ó, the next monoculture) ¬∑ **motion‚Üíautocorr-tempo‚Üípolytempo-canon TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone ‚Äî the jury's banned meta-technique) ¬∑ **cerebral / Ikeda-clinical / metric-tension VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids)]` ‚Äî **clean on every single jury ban.** The renderer choice was the deciding curation axis (see Curate).
- **Love-aware bias:** none directly applicable (polytempo/time-tension is a cerebral lane with no love cluster); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Act ‚Äî DEEP fan-out (3 parallel folder-isolated sonnet builders, one concept ‚Äî *conduct incommensurable tempi with your body* ‚Äî via three input√órender attacks):** `545-motion-loom` (no-ML optical-flow motion energy ‚Üí three.js woven threads ‚Äî **WINNER**) ¬∑ `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe **Hands** two-hand conducting ‚Üí SVG scrolling loom, 514's exact visual lineage ‚Äî complete, careful self-report, lost on the diversity audit: SVG already 3√ó ‚Üí a ship makes it 4√ó) ¬∑ `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe **Pose** full-body two-arm conducting ‚Üí SVG **orbital phase-clock** idiom: dots that sweep + never realign ‚Äî complete, the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect). Both losers banked as detailed **IDEAS ¬ß401** seeds.

**Curate ‚Äî why 545 won:** all three are the same conducted-Nancarrow-canon concept; the deciding axes were (1) **diversity by the jury's own mechanical audit** ‚Äî SVG is already 3√ó in the rolling-15, so shipping a SVG sibling (544 or 546) would make SVG **4√ó = newly over-represented**, the exact renderer-monoculture the jury is fighting ("the screen surface keeps relocating"); three.js sits at 1√ó ‚Üí 545 is the only one of the three that *lowers* the renderer concentration. (2) **Surprise + off-the-ML-default** (jury provocations #2/#3) ‚Äî "the room itself can't keep time, extracted with NO ML" is the bigger, more surprising swing than two literal hands, and it's the only approach with zero ML dependency (no MediaPipe model/WASM download to fail on Karel's device). (3) **robustness of LOADING** ‚Äî 545 needs only `getUserMedia` + WebGL where 544/546 also need the MediaPipe CDN+model. (4) **#1 cleanliness** ‚Äî 545's "tempo from optical motion, no ML" is a marginally more defensible cross-modal first than 544/546's "beat detection from a tracked landmark." 544 (precision/514-continuity) + 546 (orbital-clock idiom) banked; **both their builder agents had COMPLETED before any folder removal** (see Validate ‚Äî there WAS a delayed-flush race this cycle, handled).

**Validate:** removed 544/546 folders ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with the winner ‚Üí **exit 0**. THEN discovered **546's folder had re-appeared** fully written (its earlier "completed" notification was premature ‚Äî page.tsx+README flushed *after* my first empty check and after my first `rm`); since 546 had been present during that first build, I **`rm -rf`'d it definitively** (confirmed gone, agent since completed so no further writes) and **re-ran the authoritative build with ONLY `545` present** ‚Üí **exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 105s`, `‚úì Generating static pages (437/437)`, `/dream/545-motion-loom 5.71 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static** (the 294 kB First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with `537`/`432`). Builder self-reported `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors + `eslint --max-warnings=0` clean on the folder. `git status` clean: only `545-motion-loom/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in this sandbox).

**Honesty carry-forward ‚Äî unverified surface (545):** (a) **whether autocorrelation on REAL room motion yields a musically-meaningful tempo** ‚Äî the autocorrelator returns *a* BPM even for near-random motion, so noisy/moderate-motion scenes may read erratically until the 6 s buffer fills; this is the CORE interaction's fidelity and the single most important thing to check live (the ghost-motion auto-demo masks it for the hands-free glance, but a real conductor's experience hinges on it). (b) WebGL `linewidth>1` is not honored on most drivers ‚Üí threads render ~1px not as glowing ribbons (the node-pulse spheres carry the glow; cycle-3 fix = `Line2`/`LineMaterial`). (c) O(n¬≤) autocorr per video frame ‚Äî fine on desktop, may need batching to every 5th frame on low-end mobile. (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. (e) node-pool wraps at 160 simultaneous pulses (artifacts only at 170 BPM √ó 5). The ghost-motion auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a weaving, drifting, (post-Start) singing canon with zero permission.

## Cycle 400 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 12:26 UTC ¬∑ KIDS build (400 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `541-kids-liquid-light` ‚Äî **A 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.** Drag a finger and you inject swirling colored dye into a *real fluid simulation*; the speed and direction of the swirl drive a warm, ever-evolving pentatonic wash. No goal, no words, no wrong move ‚Äî infinite calm sensory play, with a hands-free "ghost finger" wandering the pool from frame one.

**Primary renderer = WebGPU compute (WGSL):** a real-time **stable-fluids (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999)** solver on a 192√ó192 `rgba16float` grid ‚Äî add-forces (finger impulse + Gaussian dye injection) ‚Üí semi-Lagrangian advect velocity ‚Üí divergence ‚Üí **28-iter Jacobi pressure solve** (ping-pong) ‚Üí subtract-gradient (divergence-free projection) ‚Üí advect dye ‚Äî then a full-screen-triangle render pipeline tone-maps the dye to luminous glow on dark. **Graceful degradation:** `navigator.gpu` missing / adapter-device-context failure ‚Üí a Canvas2D **"lite fluid"** (a few thousand glowing dye particles advected by coarse curl-noise + finger impulse, additive `"lighter"` over a fading dark trail) + a `text-rose-300` "Playing in lite mode ‚ú®" notice ‚Äî still swirls, still sings; this is the iPad safety net (iOS Safari WebGPU is recent/uneven). **Sonification:** swirl-speed ‚Üí lowpass brightness + voice count; vertical position ‚Üí **C-major pentatonic** register (C3‚ÄìC5, nothing ever wrong); additive triangle/sine wash with `setTargetAtTime` glides; always-on C2+G2 breathing pad (never silent); kids-safe master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(‚â§8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí6 dB, 20:1 brick-wall) ‚Üí destination`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock, `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas ‚Äî no mic/camera/network/secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again (the recurring container-drift: local stale at cycle 305 `2e98f5e`, origin force-updated to cycle 399 `9e96178` = `538-xenharmonic-lattice`); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `9e96178`; max committed folder on disk **538**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (FIRST run hit a transient network failure that left node_modules wiped + `next` not found at build time; a SECOND `npm ci` succeeded cleanly, exit 0, 1455 pkgs ‚Äî package.json/lock untouched). Pre-allocated **541/542/543** to three builders (verified free; 539/540 are banked *text* seeds from ¬ß399, NOT folders ‚Äî skipped to avoid number reuse).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß400):** WebSearch on arxiv June 2026 + developmental rhythm/entrainment for children. cs.SD this window remains **server-side ML** (still **#5 unclaimable**, the carried meta-finding, said plainly). ## Cycle 398 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (398 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `537-kids-sky-murmuration` ‚Äî **The child looks UP into a deep 3D dusk sky where a real murmuration of thousands of glowing starlings swirls in volumetric depth ‚Äî birds near and far, the whole cloud breathing and turning ‚Äî and the murmuration SINGS; a finger gently shepherds it, and when the cloud splits into sub-flocks you HEAR it split into harmony, resolving back to a chord when it re-merges.** A living weather of birds you stand under. **three.js** `THREE.Points` cloud (~2.5‚Äì4k points, additive blending, soft sprite, depth-coded colour near-warm/far-violet, ExpFog, a slowly drifting camera so depth reads), driven by an **emergent 3D boids engine** (Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion, spatial-hash neighbour lookups, boundary avoidance) in `flock.ts`. **Emergent flock state ‚Üí harmony** (the murmuration literally sings): cohesion/alignment-order ‚Üí harmonic richness & consonance (tight calm cloud = warm settled chord; scattered swirl = brighter, more voices, sparkle); centroid height (Y) ‚Üí pentatonic register; up to 4 spatial clusters detected every ~200 ms (`computeClusters`, grid-bucket) each sustain their OWN pentatonic voice so a **split is audible as a new interval and a merge resolves toward unison/octave** ‚Äî the magic; mean speed/turbulence ‚Üí gentle tremolo + airy wash. C-major pentatonic so nothing is ever wrong; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad; master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(8 kHz, kids-safe) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí6 dB, 18:1) ‚Üí destination`, all `setTargetAtTime`. AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`). **Always-on auto-demo:** a scripted 3D "ghost shepherd" wanders a Lissajous path and a second attractor phases in/out on a ~12 s cycle so the cloud **visibly divides into harmonising flocks and re-merges, camera drifting, from frame one with zero permission** ‚Äî the hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a swirling, singing, splitting murmuration; cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Degradation:** three.js/WebGL context fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D 2D dot-flock (CPU boids ~300) that still flocks + sings; audio always continues; geometry/material disposed on unmount. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js ‚Äî no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is already an installed repo dependency ‚Äî imported normally, NOT via CDN, NOT added).

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again (the recurring container-drift: 363/368/371/.../395/396/397) ‚Äî local stale at **cycle 305** (`2e98f5e`), origin force-updated to **cycle 397** (`1c86ff1` = `532-vocoder-veil`); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `1c86ff1`; max committed folder on disk **532**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded; confirmed three@0.182 present). Pre-allocated **535/536/537** to three builders (verified free; 530/531/533/534 are banked *text* seeds from ¬ß396/¬ß397, NOT folders ‚Äî skipped to avoid number reuse; max folder on disk was 532).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß398):** WebSearch on arxiv cs.SD June 2026 real-time interactive music in-browser for children. Freshest dated artifact: **"Audio Interaction Model"** (arXiv 2606.05121, Jun 3 2026 ‚Äî a unified *streaming* model with a perceive-decide-respond loop). Like every cs.SD window since ¬ß386 it is **server-side ML** (a hosted streaming model, not client-implementable in a browser) ‚Üí **#5 honestly unclaimable**, the carried meta-finding; said plainly. **Actionable read:** I audited the ambition manual's "counts-as-#1" named-technique list AND grepped the lab for the obvious remaining kids #1s ‚Äî and found the easy lab-firsts are now genuinely spent at ~360 prototypes: **TF.js** taken (529), **MediaPipe Hands** taken (524) + **FaceLandmarker blendshapes** taken (423), **MediaPipe Pose** (493), **WebGPU** (520/518/502, also not iOS-safe for kids), **AudioWorklet** taken (474/475), **GPU fluid** taken (433/84/15/3), **boids/flocking** itself present in some form (75-houdini-particle-flock adult, 128-fish-tap Canvas2D, 16-particle-life-gpu). Refs: Reynolds 1987 / Cavagna PNAS 2010 / Hamilton "Selfish Herd" 1971. **Ambition 3/5** (#2+#3+#4). **Didn't win:** technically the most ambitious (a real GPU flocking sim), but it self-flags genuine **iOS-Safari fragility** (`texStorage2D RGBA32F` neighbour texture + `PIXEL_PACK_BUFFER`/`getBufferSubData` readback) on the very iPad Karel reviews on, and WebGL2 is 2√ó‚Üí3√ó where three.js is 0√ó. The strongest **technical** bank ‚Äî resurrect when we want the GPU-sim-at-scale ambition (5‚Äì10k agents).
- **`536-kids-lantern-shoal` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß398, folder `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî the **Canvas2D friendly-character** approach (~380 lantern-fish with eyes/tails, spatial-hash boids, touch + tilt "current," k-means clusters ‚Üí voices). Refs: Reynolds 1987 / Partridge 1982 fish-schooling. **Ambition 3/5** (#2+#3+#4). **Didn't win on DIVERSITY, not quality:** it's the **best literal-4yo legibility** of the three (individual friends you can see moving together), but Canvas2D is already 3√ó in the rolling-10 ‚Äî shipping it pushes Canvas2D to **4√ó**, the exact monoculture trap I flagged. Out on the diversity gate. Strong bank for when Canvas2D is scarce again, or fold its character-art into 537.

**Curate (why 537 won):** for a **kids DEEP** cycle judged via a hands-free 06:30 phone glance, all three are the same magical concept on three attacks. 537 wins on the deciding axes: (1) **diversity** ‚Äî three.js is the **single scarcest renderer (0√ó rolling-10)**, so it diversifies hardest and dodges the Canvas2D/SVG 4√ó trap that 536 would trigger; (2) **"massively bigger" / awe** ‚Äî true 3D volumetric depth (near/far birds, drifting camera, fog) is the biggest, most awe-inducing swing, exactly Karel's directive, where 535 is 2D points and 536 is 2D character-art; (3) **robustness on the review device** ‚Äî the standard `THREE.Points` path is battle-tested on iOS Safari where 535's float-texture + PBO-readback GPU path is self-flagged fragile; 537 reports zero TS/ESLint and authoritative build passed; (4) **glance** ‚Äî the ghost-shepherd split/merge animates + sings from frame one with no permission, with a Canvas2D fallback so it's never blank. 535 (GPU-sim technical bank) + 536 (Canvas2D legibility bank) banked as detailed IDEAS ¬ß398 seeds; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build.

**Validate:** the two non-winner **builder agents were still running** and kept re-creating their folders after I removed them (a folder-isolation race the orchestration guide warns about) ‚Äî first authoritative build FAILED on `Module not found: ./shoal` because 536's agent had re-written `page.tsx` post-deletion. **Resolved correctly (not a code fix ‚Äî a process fix, no winner-folder change):** `TaskStop` on both non-winner agents (535/536) ‚Üí removed both folders ‚Üí `rm -rf .next` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY `537` (+ the already-committed `532`) present ‚Üí **exit 0, "‚úì Compiled successfully in 83s", "‚úì Generating static pages (434/434)", `‚óã /dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration 6.21 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static.** (The 297 kB First Load is the three.js bundle ‚Äî in line with the lab's other three.js routes, e.g. `/dream/432-three-body`.) `git status` clean: only `537-kids-sky-murmuration/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. (The `src/lib/*` lines in the build log are pre-existing ESLint *warnings*, not errors.) **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no three.js/WebGL/audio in this sandbox).

**Queued next + why:**
- **Cycle 399 (adult, odd):** alternation says WIDE next (398 was DEEP).

- **Banked this fire:** `535-kids-starling-choir` (raw WebGL2 GPU transform-feedback boids ‚Äî the technical resurrect for scale) + `536-kids-lantern-shoal` (Canvas2D friendly-character shoal ‚Äî the legibility resurrect / character-art donor for 537).
- **Carried open spines:** Living Earth (502), Companion/Presence (518), Granular (520), Together (505/508), Metric/Time (514), Hand-as-creature (524), Genre-Arc (526), Drawing-comes-alive/browser-ML (529), Cross-synthesis/his-real-music (532), Living-flock (537), Wave-Field (478/489). Banked text seeds still open: `533-hollow` (comb/phase-cancellation tension, three.js) + `534-third-ear` (Tartini difference-tone phantom melody).

**Notes:**
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî pure client Web Audio + three.js; no mic/camera/network/secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally ‚Äî not a CDN import, not added to package.json).
- **Honesty carry-forward:** 537 is **build-verified, NOT browser-verified.** Unverified surface (per builder + my read): (a) **cluster-voice salience** ‚Äî whether 2‚Äì4 simultaneous sustained pentatonic voices read as an audibly distinct *split ‚Üí merge* on a phone speaker behind the limiter (the cluster-detection threshold may need tuning; the single most important thing to check live); (b) whether ~2.5‚Äì4k `THREE.Points` + per-frame CPU boids holds ‚â•30 fps on an older iPad (the Canvas2D ~300-agent fallback covers the worst case); (c) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + `webkitAudioContext`; (d) whether the slow camera drift gives enough parallax for 3D depth to read on a small phone screen vs an iPad. The ghost-shepherd auto-demo + Canvas2D dot-flock fallback are the safety nets so absent GPU never blocks the 06:30 glance.
- **Process learning (logged for the orchestration playbook):** spawning async builders and then `rm -rf`-ing a non-winner folder while its agent is *still running* races the agent's own Write tool ‚Äî it re-creates the folder and the authoritative build then fails on the half-written loser. **Fix:** before removing any non-winner folder, `TaskStop` its builder agent (or wait for its completion notification) ‚Äî only THEN `rm -rf`. Applied this cycle after the first build failed; second build clean.
- **Jury alignment:** answers the standing "massively bigger / too similar" mandate with a genuinely **bigger concept** (a 3D volumetric singing murmuration) on the **scarcest renderer** (three.js, 0√ó rolling-10), in a **JOYFUL/awe** register that dodges the now-4√ó "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE AND the Canvas2D/SVG 4√ó trap, and steers OFF yesterday's drawing-ML theme; the dive *steered* honestly (cs.SD = server-ML + grep-audit "easy kids #1s spent" ‚Üí bigger-concept-on-scarce-renderer) rather than manufacturing a #1 or #5. One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 398:`.

## Cycle 397 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (397 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `532-vocoder-veil` ‚Äî **You sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano ‚Äî your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.** The lab's **FIRST channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` = 0√ó across ~360 built prototypes ‚Äî only an INDEX mention, never a built piece). A classic Homer-Dudley **16-band analysis/synthesis filterbank**: the live mic (modulator) is split into 16 log-spaced bandpass bands (120 Hz‚Äì7 kHz); each band's energy is followed (squared via a `WaveShaperNode` x¬≤ curve ‚Üí smoothed by a ~20 Hz lowpass) and that audio-rate envelope is connected directly into the `.gain` AudioParam of the matching band on the CARRIER ‚Äî **Karel's actual piano recording**, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (the confirmed WH track id used by 283/165), looped as an `AudioBufferSourceNode`. Broadband highpassed noise is injected into the carrier so sibilants ("s/sh/f") read. The piano "talks" in your formants ‚Äî uncanny, intimate, musical. **Directly serves Karel's standing directive "incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths"** (carried open since the 441 FAL-loop ask; recent cycles had NOT used his real recordings). A **WebGL2 band-ladder** (16 glowing EQ rungs) animates from the modulator envelopes. **Auto-demo (no permission needed):** on load a built-in vowel-cycle modulator (saw + peaking formant filters cycling ah‚Üíee‚Üíoh‚Üíoo‚Üímm) drives the vocoder so the piano audibly *sings vowels* and the ladder animates with zero interaction ‚Äî the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows/sounds life before any mic grant. **Three-layer graceful degradation:** mic denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` note, auto-demo keeps running; piano fetch 404/CORS/offline ‚Üí `text-amber-300` note + a 6-voice detuned saw/square synth carrier (vocoder still fully works); no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D ladder + badge. AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock; `window.AudioContext || webkitAudioContext`); master `gain ‚Üí lowpass(7.5 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí6 dB, 16:1, 2 ms attack) ‚Üí destination`; all params `setTargetAtTime`. **No API route, no `guard`** (only network is the read-only same-origin `/api/audio/[id]` GET + the mic ‚Äî no writes, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again (the recurring container-drift: 363/368/371/376/386/387/389/392/393/394/395/396) ‚Äî local stale at **cycle 305** (`2e98f5e`), origin force-updated to **cycle 396** (`adbf68f` = `529-kids-doodle-choir`); `--ff-only` aborted ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `adbf68f`; max committed folder on disk **529**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **532/533/534** to three builders (verified free; 527/528/530/531 are banked text seeds from ¬ß395/¬ß396, NOT folders ‚Äî skipped to avoid number reuse; max folder on disk was 529).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß397):** WebSearch on arxiv cs.SD June 2026 real-time interactive music generation in-browser. Freshest dated artifacts: **Real-Time Human‚ÄìAI Musical Co-Performance** (arXiv 2604.07612, Apr 2026 ‚Äî latent-diffusion accompaniment via **MAX/MSP + a Python inference server over OSC/UDP**) and **HeartMuLa** (open music foundation models, server-GPU). Both are **server-side ML** (need a Python/CUDA inference rig) ‚Üí **#5 honestly unclaimable** (the carried meta-finding since ¬ß386). **Actionable steer:** audited the ambition manual's own "counts-as-#1" list of named major techniques against the lab ‚Äî TF.js was just taken (529); Pose/Hands/WebGPU/WebRTC/MIDI/long-form/data-sonification all already taken ‚Äî and a grep confirmed **channel vocoder = 0√ó** in built prototypes, a classic analysis/synthesis technique that is fully client-side in Web Audio TODAY. **Chain visible:** dive (cs.SD = server-ML ‚Üí pivot to the manual's named-but-untouched client-feasible DSP lane) ‚Üí today's build (the lab's first vocoder, on Karel's real piano).

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**

Additive; the ambition/diversity gates + the standing his-music directive governed.

**Act ‚Äî WIDE 3-explorer adult fire (orchestrated, 3 folder-isolated general-purpose/sonnet builders spawned concurrently in one message; each fully self-contained, own folder, no git, no shared docs, no API route; THREE orthogonal directions on THREE renderers, each dodging the banned VIBE and the 4√ó renderers):**
- **`532-vocoder-veil` (WINNER, shipped)** ‚Äî channel vocoder, Karel's real piano as carrier; **WebGL2** band-ladder; vowel auto-demo + synth-carrier fallback. Files: `page.tsx` (719), `audio.ts` (382), `README.md`. Refs: Dudley / Carlos / Heap. 5 subsystems. Ambition 3/5 (#1+#2+#3). One factual nit fixed pre-ship (README "Vermeersch" ‚Üí "Barnoski"). One TS fix on build (Float32Array generic ‚Äî see Validate).
- **`533-hollow` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß397, folder `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî **comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension** as the compositional core (the jury-named untouched tension primitive ‚Äî "tension is *absence*"): a rich drone carved by two stacked feedforward combs, notches swept through a 2-D field; **three.js** cylindrical shell whose vertices displace inward at analytic notch positions `f_k=(2k‚àí1)/(2D)`. Refs: Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* / Maryanne Amacher / the phaser-flanger lineage. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 honestly *scoped to the idea* ‚Äî comb appears elsewhere as FX/flute-model, never as the dramatic center ‚Äî +#2+#3). **Didn't win:** ties 532 on ambition, but its #1 is the *scoped* one (comb is not a clean 0√ó primitive) where 532's vocoder is a clean verified 0√ó; AND 532 fulfills the standing his-real-music directive that 533 doesn't. The most *sculptural* bank ‚Äî its three.js carving glances beautifully; resurrect as a tension-spine cycle.
- **`534-third-ear` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß397, folder `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî **combination / difference (Tartini) tones** (grep-verified clean lab-first, 0√ó): two pure sines whose difference (f‚ÇÇ‚àíf‚ÇÅ) traces a pentatonic melody that exists *only inside the listener's ear*; **audio-forward / minimal Canvas2D** (the jury's under-tested non-screen lane), with an honest "phantom-only / reinforced" A/B toggle. Refs: Tartini *il terzo suono* (1714) / Maryanne Amacher *Third Ear Music* / Galilei / Rameau. **Ambition 2/5** (#1+#3; fewest subsystems). **Didn't win ‚Äî diversity-of-experience + glance, not concept:** the most *surprising* idea of the three, but (a) it's the lowest ambition (2/5), (b) it's audio-first so the 06:30 phone GLANCE is weak, and (c) the effect is admittedly unreliable on the very phone speakers Karel reviews on (the reinforcement crutch saves audibility but undercuts the magic). The highest-*surprise* bank ‚Äî resurrect for a headphone/all-ages listening cycle.

**Curate (why 532 won):** all three are orthogonal adult directions on three distinct non-saturated renderers (WebGL2 / three.js / audio-first), dodging the banned VIBE (the WIDE point). 532 wins on: (1) **ambition** ‚Äî the cleanest verified lab-first (channel vocoder, 0√ó confirmed) vs 533's honestly-*scoped* #1 (comb exists as FX) and 534's 2/5; (2) **Karel alignment** ‚Äî it's the only one that fulfills the **standing, repeatedly-carried directive to use his actual Welcome Home recordings**, and "sing through Karel's piano" is the biggest, most-personal concept; (3) **glance robustness** ‚Äî the WebGL2 ladder + vowel auto-demo animate/sound from frame one with no permission, and it degrades to a synth carrier if the fetch fails, where 534 glances weakly and 533 is the least novel; (4) **surprise + Resonance-vibe** ‚Äî the piano talking in your voice is high-surprise and intimate (the Imogen-Heap register), exactly the transcendent/personal feel Resonance wants. 533 (sculptural comb-tension) + 534 (Tartini phantom melody) banked as detailed IDEAS ¬ß397 seeds; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build.

**Validate:** removed 533 + 534 folders, `rm -rf .next`, ran the authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY 532 present ‚Üí first pass **FAILED** on a TS error in `audio.ts:211` (`Float32Array<ArrayBufferLike>` not assignable to `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` ‚Äî the TS 5.7 typed-array generic; `WaveShaperNode.curve` wants the `ArrayBuffer`-backed form). **ONE fix attempt** (within the winner folder): `buildSquareCurve` now backs its `Float32Array` with an explicit `new ArrayBuffer(N*4)` and annotates the return `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>`. Rebuild ‚Üí **exit 0, "‚úì Compiled successfully in 67s", `‚óã /dream/532-vocoder-veil 6.48 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static.** `git status` clean: only `532-vocoder-veil/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**` modified; `package.json`/`package-lock.json`/`next.config.*` confirmed unchanged + excluded. (The `src/lib/*` lines in the build log are pre-existing ESLint *warnings*, not errors.) **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic/WebGL2/network in this sandbox).

**Queued next + why:**

- **532 cycle-2 deepening (a "his-real-music / cross-synthesis" spine):** let the user pick WHICH WH track is the carrier (a path-track menu via `journey_paths`); add a freeze/loop-grab so a held vowel sustains one piano chord into a pad; try cross-synthesis the other way (piano as modulator, voice as carrier); verify the envelope-follower magnitude actually drives the carrier gain to unity on a real voice (the key unverified surface the builder flagged ‚Äî values may sit ~0‚Äì0.1 and need scaling).
- **Banked this fire:** `533-hollow` (three.js comb/phase-cancellation tension ‚Äî the cleanest *sculptural* resurrect, a real answer to the jury's "tension in a never-touched primitive") + `534-third-ear` (Tartini difference-tone phantom melody ‚Äî the highest-surprise, resurrect for a headphone/listening cycle).

- **Honesty carry-forward:** 532 is **build-verified, NOT browser-verified.** Unverified surface (per builder + my read): (a) **envelope-follower scaling** ‚Äî the x¬≤-smoothed band envelopes may sit ~0‚Äì0.1 and not push the carrier gains to unity, so the vocoder could read too quiet without a scale factor on a real voice (the auto-demo's hand-tuned vowel formants likely mask this; the single most important thing to check live); (b) **the `/api/audio/[id]` fetch** ‚Äî `decodeAudioData` for the returned codec + CORS behind the CDN is unverified; any exception drops to the synth carrier (still fully playable, with an amber note); (c) mic-permission + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock + `webkitAudioContext`; (d) WebGL2 on older Android WebView (Canvas2D ladder fallback covers it); (e) `AudioBufferSourceNode.detune` continuous change for the pitch slider. The vowel auto-demo + synth-carrier + Canvas2D fallbacks are the safety nets so absent mic/piano/WebGL2 never blocks the 06:30 glance.
- **Jury alignment:** answers the standing "massively bigger / too similar" mandate with a genuine **lab-first technique** (the first vocoder) on the **standing his-real-music directive**, in an **uncanny-intimate** register that dodges the now-‚â•4√ó "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE AND the 4√ó renderer trap (ships on the scarcest renderer, WebGL2); the dive *steered* honestly (cs.SD = server-ML ‚Üí the manual's named-untouched client-feasible lane) rather than manufacturing a #5. One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 397:`.

## Cycle 396 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (396 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 approaches, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `529-kids-doodle-choir` ‚Äî **A 4-year-old draws a simple doodle with their finger; a real in-browser neural net recognizes WHAT they drew; the drawing then comes alive ‚Äî animates and SINGS its own warm little motif ‚Äî and stays on the page as part of a growing, gently-looping CHOIR of singing creatures.** The lab's **FIRST use of TensorFlow.js / any ML recognition** in ~360 prototypes (grep-verified: zero `@tensorflow`/`tfjs` anywhere). TF.js is loaded via **CDN dynamic import** (`@tensorflow/tfjs@4/+esm`, `webpackIgnore` so Next never bundles it ‚Äî the `493`/MediaPipe pattern, no npm dep); the drawing canvas is rasterized to 28√ó28 grayscale and run through **DoodleNet** (yining1023 ‚Äî a CNN trained on Google's Quick, Draw! 345-category dataset, ported to TF.js), whose top-1 class is mapped to one of **8 storybook archetypes** (sun / fish / bird / plant / cloud / star / critter / home), each with its own Canvas2D animation (rises & pulses / wiggles / flutters / sways / drifts / twinkles / bounces / breathes) and a distinct warm motif in **C major / C pentatonic** so nothing ever sounds wrong together. Each creature keeps its faint original stroke visible and loops its motif into the choir. A scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** traces sun‚Üífish‚Üíbird‚Üíplant‚Üístar‚Üícritter‚Üícloud‚Üíhome on load ‚Äî **before any drawing, and bypassing the async classifier entirely (it assigns the intended archetype directly)** ‚Äî so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance ALWAYS shows animated, singing creatures even if the model never loads. **Two-layer graceful degradation:** TF.js/model fail (network blocked / CDN change) ‚Üí a hand-coded **geometric heuristic classifier** (bounding box / ink density / aspect ratio) keeps it fully playable with a `text-rose-300` "‚óà shape matching" badge; Canvas2D absent ‚Üí a notice. Master chain `gain ‚Üí lowpass(‚â§7.8 kHz) ‚Üí DynamicsCompressor(‚àí6 dB, 20:1) ‚Üí destination`; all envelopes `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; the only network is the public TF.js CDN + the public DoodleNet model ‚Äî no mic, camera, secrets, or writes). **No new npm deps.**

## Cycle 395 ‚Äî 2026-06-12 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (395 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `526-jazz-room` ‚Äî **A living, self-playing late-night jazz trio ‚Äî walking upright bass, Bill Evans rootless piano comping, brushed drums ‚Äî that performs a full arc (head ‚Üí piano solo ‚Üí bass solo ‚Üí trade-fours ‚Üí head-out) over an F Jazz Blues, with you free to "sit in."** The lab's **FIRST jazz piece** (grep-verified: zero `jazz`/`swing`/`bebop`/`walking-bass` folders across 350 prototypes) and an alternate dramatic arc to Resonance's psychedelic 6-phase journey engine ‚Äî directly serving Karel's explicit **priority #4** (journey-engine alternatives: "jazz responsive" is named in the directive). A real **generative jazz-theory engine** (`jazz.ts`, 391 lines): F Jazz Blues 12-bar changes, **Bill Evans Type A/B rootless voicings** (3-7-9 / 7-9-3 shells) with distance-minimizing voice-leading between successive chords, a four-beat **walking bass** (root‚Üí5th‚Üí3rd‚Üíchromatic-approach-on-beat-4), **2:1 swing** timing. A **lookahead scheduler** (25 ms interval, 120 ms horizon off `audioCtx.currentTime`) drives plucked-string bass (tri+saw‚Üílowpass), an FM Rhodes-ish comping voice, and brushed drums (filtered-noise brushes + sine-sweep kick + ride). A **Canvas2D** smoky-club scene (deep brown-black, warm amber spotlight, three glowing bass/piano/drum presences that pulse + radiate rings on note onsets, drifting smoke, chord + phase HUD) plays itself from the first frame, so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a swinging, glowing scene. Optional **sit-in** keyboard (9 F-blues keys) adds a melody voice on top. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚àí6 dB / 20:1). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D ‚Äî no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again ‚Äî local at **cycle 305** (`2e98f5e`), origin at **cycle 394** (`f2cb452` = `524-kids-hand-firebird`); merge-base empty / `--ff-only` aborted (the recurring container-drift pattern: 363/368/371/376/386/387/389/392/393/394) ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `f2cb452`; max committed folder on disk **524**). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **526/527/528** to three builders (verified free; 521/522/523/525 are banked text seeds from ¬ß393/¬ß394, NOT folders).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß395):** WebSearch on (a) WebGPU creative-coding / audio-reactive May‚ÄìJune 2026, (b) Entagma/Horikawa differential-growth 2026. Freshest dated artifacts: **DITHER-CORE** (2026-05-04, audio-reactive ‚äï fluid ‚äï WebGPU) + **Utsubo "What's New in Three.js (2026)"** (three.js ‚Üí WebGPU backend). Both <60 days but not bindable papers ‚Üí **#5 honestly unclaimable** (the carried meta-finding since ¬ß386). The **actionable read is a diversity steer:** the frontier is all-WebGPU, and the lab JUST shipped WebGPU 3√ó (520/518/502) ‚Äî chasing it = 4√ó monoculture. So steer AWAY from WebGPU toward the scarce renderers, and lean into where freshness actually lives at ~350 prototypes: **GENRE / dramatic-arc diversity** (Karel's #4). ## Cycle 394 ‚Äî 2026-06-11 (UTC) ¬∑ KIDS build (394 % 2 == 0) ¬∑ **DEEP** (3 renderers, one concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `524-kids-hand-firebird` ‚Äî **Hold up your hand and it becomes a glowing firebird of light ‚Äî a creature made of ~2000 additively-blended GPU particles that gathers around your fingers, blooms wide and SINGS when you open your hand, and gathers into a quiet ember when you close it.** The lab's **first MediaPipe Hands** (21-landmark hand-tracking) piece ‚Äî the lab used MediaPipe *Pose* once (`493-kids-feeling-forest`) but **never Hands** (grep-clean: `HandLandmarker`/`hand-landmark`/"MediaPipe Hands" = 0√ó before this). A **raw WebGL2** particle system (2000 points, additive blending, comet trails via a fade-feedback pass) is attracted to the live hand landmarks; **openness** (avg fingertip distance from palm, normalized by hand span) ‚Üí bloom width + sung-voice trigger + brightness; **wrist height** ‚Üí pitch (up = higher, quantized to C-major pentatonic so nothing is wrong); **finger spread** ‚Üí scatter width + harmonic content; **movement speed** ‚Üí sparkle/trail intensity. Warm pentatonic Web-Audio voice + an always-on detuned-sine ambient pad so it's never silent; master through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (‚àí6 dB / 20:1) + ‚â§8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe), all `setTargetAtTime` envelopes. A **scripted virtual hand** (fist‚Üíopen-bloom‚Üíclose‚Üíflutter, ~8 s loop) drives the firebird + voice **on load before any camera permission** and resumes after 3.5 s of no hand ‚Äî so the 06:30 hands-free phone glance always shows a glowing, singing creature with zero interaction and zero camera. `navigator.mediaDevices`/MediaPipe-CDN/WebGL2 absent or camera denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D glow fallback that still sings + the auto-demo keeps running. AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; camera is local hand-landmark analysis only ‚Äî never recorded/uploaded; no network beyond the MediaPipe model CDN, no secrets). **No new npm deps** ‚Äî MediaPipe loaded via CDN dynamic ESM import (the established lab pattern from `493`/`444`), raw WebGL2, no three.js.

**Orient / git sync:** `git fetch` showed local `main` badly diverged again ‚Äî local at **cycle 305** (`2e98f5e`), origin at **cycle 393** (`8c2074c` = `520-singing-dune`); merge-base = the stale local HEAD, `--ff-only` aborted (the recurring container-drift pattern: 363/368/371/376/386/387/389/392/393) ‚Üí `git reset --hard origin/main` (HEAD `8c2074c`; max committed folder on disk **520**; 521/522 are banked text seeds from ¬ß393, NOT folders). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` MISSING in this fresh container ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0 from existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded). Pre-allocated **523/524/525** to three builders (verified free; 521/522 left distinct from the banked-seed numbers to avoid confusion).

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬ß394):** WebSearch on (a) MediaPipe hand-tracking creative-coding + WebGPU/music June 2026 + (b) arxiv cs.SD real-time gesture sonification. cs.SD this week is **again server-side ML** / months-old gesture-control frameworks (e.g. arXiv 2504.19460, Apr 2025) ‚Äî nothing client-implementable and nothing <14 days, so **#5 honestly unclaimable** (the same carried meta-finding as ¬ß386‚Äì¬ß393; said plainly per jury 2026-06-10). The actionable read came from the MediaPipe dive: **real-time 21-keypoint hand-landmark tracking (MediaPipe Hands) runs in-browser via WASM/WebGL at <35 ms / 28‚Äì30 fps on mid hardware** ‚Äî mature, on-device, browser-ready, and a starved input lane the lab has touched only once (Pose, 493) and never with the *hands* model. **Chain visible:** dive (cs.SD = server-ML ‚Üí pivot to "MediaPipe Hands is browser-ready and lab-fresh") ‚Üí today's build (the lab's first hand-tracking instrument).

## Cycle 393 ‚Äî 2026-06-11 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (393 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `520-singing-dune` ‚Äî **One living dune of sand, under its own gravity. You tip the world; it avalanches and finds a new angle of repose ‚Äî forever, never the same. The dune's own internal motion IS the sound (the real "song of dunes").** The lab's **first actual continuum simulation**: a **WebGPU compute MLS-MPM** (Moving Least Squares Material Point Method) granular solid ‚Äî 6k particles on a 128¬≤ grid, 5 compute passes/substep (clearGrid ‚Üí P2G ‚Üí gridUpdate ‚Üí G2P ‚Üí render), APIC affine momentum + a simplified Drucker-Prager plasticity so the sand *piles and avalanches* instead of splashing like water. Gravity comes from **device-orientation tilt** (gamma/beta ‚Üí gravity vector; pointer-drag + arrow-key fallbacks on desktop ‚Äî the mental model is "tip the world," never tap/paint). The dune's aggregate physics drives a **booming-dune granular drone**: kinetic energy ‚Üí drone density + filter cutoff; mean grain shear ‚Üí a low fundamental (72‚Üí108 Hz JI) that bends up during an avalanche and sinks back at repose; avalanche impulses ‚Üí soft filtered grain bursts. No harmonic progression ‚Äî the drama is entirely in the sand's motion; **no goal, no win, no resolve button.** `navigator.gpu` absent (incl. iOS Safari mid-2026) ‚Üí a **CPU MLS-MPM** fallback (2k particles, 64¬≤ grid, mpm88-style quadratic B-spline weights + APIC C-matrix, Canvas2D point render) that runs **on load** with no interaction, so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows a settling, sounding dune. ## Cycle 391 ‚Äî 2026-06-11 (UTC) ¬∑ ADULT build (391 % 2 == 1) ¬∑ **WIDE** (3 divergent explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `514-polytempo-loom` ‚Äî **Five voices, identical consonant pitches, simultaneously different IRRATIONAL tempo ratios (1, ‚àö2, œÜ, e/2, œÄ/2) ‚Äî drifting eternally out of and toward phase, never landing a shared downbeat. The only tension lives in TIME.** A polytempo / tempo-canon lattice in the lineage of **Conlon Nancarrow's _Studies for Player Piano_** (Study No. 40 "Transcendental" = canon e:œÄ; his ‚àö2 canons, where layers share no common period so true convergence is effectively never). All five voices play the same pentatonic melodic cell on a soft bell/pluck synth (D pentatonic across 2 octaves ‚Üí **zero harmonic tension**; the entire drama is metric). Each voice runs its own "Tale of Two Clocks" lookahead scheduler (25 ms interval, 120 ms ahead, sample-accurate off `AudioContext.currentTime`) at its own fixed period; the voices phase against each other forever. **NO resolution, NO solve button** ‚Äî the optional "stir the loom" spread slider widens/narrows the mutual-drift *velocity* but preserves irrationality at every setting (scaling an irrational deviation-from-1 by a rational keeps it irrational), so it never aligns. Visual is **inline SVG only** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGL): a Nancarrow piano-roll loom ‚Äî five colored lanes whose note-onset marks scroll at the same px/sec so faster voices show denser marks and the lanes drift across each other into transient moir√© near-alignments that disperse; a dashed "NOW" playhead, per-lane ratio tags + live BPM, marks dim into the past and glow on fire. The SVG animates from mount via a silent simulated schedule so a no-audio 06:30 phone glance sees the drift alive before any gesture; audio starts on **Begin** (AudioContext built in the gesture ‚Äî iOS unlock). `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; audio-fail ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice, loom keeps drifting. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG ‚Äî no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps. ~362-line `page.tsx`.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared:**
- **Research-first dive (path a/c):** scanned arxiv cs.SD/cs.GR + the polytempo/Nancarrow register. Freshest dated artifact: **Amanous ‚Äî "Distribution-Switching for Superhuman Piano Density on Disklavier," arXiv 2603.16890 (submitted 2026-02-28)** ‚Äî unifies Nancarrow tempo canons + Xenakis stochastics + L-systems and finds a *computational saturation threshold at 24‚Äì30 notes/sec*. Surprising + directly Nancarrow-lineage, but **~3.5 months old ‚Üí #5 NOT claimed** (honest; no <14-day bindable finding on metric dissonance this window ‚Äî the microtonal/polytempo world is mature, not freshly-published). The dive *positively bound* the named-reference set and confirmed metric dissonance is the right untouched primitive. RESEARCH ¬ß391 logged.
- **mode: WIDE** ‚Äî 390 was DEEP and STATE ¬ß390 explicitly queued "WIDE next per the alternation"; the JURY 2026-06-11's central complaint is monoculture ("too similar"), which WIDE with 3 orthogonal fresh concepts directly attacks. The three briefs each cleared the floor via DIFFERENT renderer√ótechnique, ALL answering the jury's headline ("refuse to resolve, one presence, not on Canvas2D") from a different angle.
- **ambition: 2/5** ‚Äî **#1** never-used technique (**irrational-ratio polytempo / metric-dissonance lattice** ‚Äî grep-verified lab-first: `375-tempo-canon` is a *DTW score-FOLLOWER* and `302-mirror-canon` is single-pair *Reich phasing*; simultaneous fixed irrational tempi √Ý la Nancarrow is 0√ó; `nancarrow`/`polytempo`/`metric dissonance`/`polymeter` all grep-empty) + **#3** named reference (**Conlon Nancarrow, _Studies for Player Piano_**, Study 40 e:œÄ / ‚àö2 canons; + Amanous 2603.16890; Callender "Performing the Irrational" MTO 20.1). **#2 NOT claimed** (1 audio source + 1 SVG renderer = 2 subsystems; honest). **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle ‚Äî could seed a "metric dissonance / polytempo" spine). **#5 NOT claimed** (no <14-day finding ‚Äî said plainly; the jury rewards this honesty).
- **diversity: banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ WebGL2-shader OUTPUT (4√ó) ¬∑ Plomp‚ÄìLevelt/Sethares-roughness TECH (4√ó) ¬∑ touch/multi-touch INPUT (6√ó) ¬∑ "tension-you-resolve-through-action" VIBE (~9√ó) ¬∑ the "two-parties-negotiate" CONCEPT]** (JURY 2026-06-11) ¬∑ **picked (514)=[generative/none INPUT (no touch ‚Äî just Begin + an optional non-resolving slider) ¬∑ SVG OUTPUT (the jury's fresh renderer; dodges Canvas2D + WebGL2) ¬∑ irrational-polytempo / metric-dissonance TECH (lab-first, the jury's provocation-#1 "tension you COUNT, not tension you hear beating" ‚Äî explicitly NOT the banned roughness engine) ¬∑ hypnotic-eternal-NON-RESOLVING VIBE (no solve button; a state to inhabit) ¬∑ ONE-presence CONCEPT (one drifting mechanism, never two negotiating parties)]** ‚Äî hits **NONE** of the hard bans. Answers JURY 2026-06-11 #1 (tension in a never-touched primitive ‚Äî TIME, after 513 took comb-notch), #2 (refuses resolution ‚Äî the `490`/`513` un-resolving lineage), #3 (SVG, the explicit anti-Canvas2D ask), #5 (one presence, not duality).
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): no love directly dictates a polytempo piece; `267-spectral-drift`‚ù§Ô∏è + `236-particle-life-song`‚ù§Ô∏è (loved evolving/emergent-texture pieces) softly back the long-form-drift register all three explorers worked in. Additive ‚Äî the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick.

**Curation:** **514 won** over two strong siblings. All three refuse resolution, are about one presence, and dodge every banned tag ‚Äî each via a different renderer√ótechnique (the WIDE point). **514 is the tightest fit to the jury's LOUDEST provocation (#1)** ‚Äî it is the only candidate that puts the tension squarely in TIME (metric dissonance, the one untouched primitive left after 513 claimed comb-notch), with an exact grep-clean named reference (Nancarrow) and the **most robust demo on Karel's review phone** (pure SVG, no camera/mic/device/GPU dependency, the drift visibly alive on load with zero permissions). It's also the most legibly *new* ("huh ‚Äî you can SEE irrational tempi drift"). - `516-slow-presence` ‚Äî **the strongest seed**: a real **WebGPU compute** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field (512¬≤, ping-pong `rgba16float` storage textures, 8 steps/frame) whose feed/kill rates drift along a 420 s non-repeating 7-irrational-harmonic LFO so the morphology at minute 5 is unlike minute 1 (memory; never loops); a Lydian drone mirrors the SAME LFO path (no GPU readback). SVG/DOM fallback (no Canvas2D) when `navigator.gpu` absent; audio always runs. Refs Eno *Music for Airports* + Anadol + Pearson 1993. **This is the deliberate `490-disintegration` successor the jury asked for (#2 "490 should have had children") on the jury-blessed WebGPU lane (#3)** ‚Äî and the best **#4+#5 5/5 candidate** the lab has: take it to cycle 2 binding a fresh <14-day paper. Lost only because its tension is *entropy/non-repetition*, not the jury's headline untouched **tension** primitive, and WebGPU is the riskiest demo surface (iOS).
- `515-two-tempos-one-body` ‚Äî the boldest FORMAT: a near-screenless cross-modal polytempo ‚Äî one audio pulse (period A=1.20 s) vs a **haptic** pulse (Vibration API, period B=A/‚àö2) ‚Äî two irrational tempi, one heard, one *felt* in the hand, drifting forever; the screen is two faint CSS radial-gradient breathing rings + "close your eyes." `navigator.vibrate` absent (iOS/desktop) ‚Üí amber notice + the inner emerald ring carries tempo B as a visual fallback; audio always works. Refs Nancarrow + Oliveros *Deep Listening* / La Monte Young. The genuine audio/haptic-only lane the jury dared (#3) ‚Äî lost because haptics already exist (`400-soundwalk-room`, as proximity not tempo) so its #1 is shakier, and on Karel's likely-iOS phone the full felt effect degrades to two glow rings.

**Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` with only 514 present ‚Üí exit 0, `‚úì Compiled successfully in 36.0s`, `/dream/514-polytempo-loom` prerendered **static 4.4 kB / 107 kB First Load**; the winner builder also self-reported its folder tsc+eslint-clean), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) ‚Äî unverified surface: whether the five irrational tempi *audibly* read as distinct drifting streams vs. mush at BASE_BPM 72 (the bell decay is 1.6 s ‚Äî denser voices may overlap); whether the cross-lane moir√© near-alignments are *perceptible* as the visual payoff (PX_PER_SEC=58, MARKS_PER_LANE=44 ‚Äî may want a denser window); the setTimeout-driven visual flash vs. the AudioContext-scheduled note may drift apart by a few ms under load; the spread slider's "stir not solve" framing reading as intended; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The silent-on-load SVG drift is the safety net so the 06:30 glance always sees the loom alive.
