Auto-plays itself hands-free (auto-demo sweeps the heading + auto-collects through the identical audio path), so it's alive at the 06:30 review with no sensor, no headphones, no second device.

## Cycle 324 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (3 interaction-model approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `341-kids-star-pair` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide it (or hum) up/down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light. The two voices sound continuously over a D drone; out of tune you HEAR real acoustic beating + SEE the stars jitter; land within ¬±35¬¢ of a just-intonation ratio and the beating vanishes, a bright beam snaps between the stars, they pulse together, a chime rings, ~60 sparkles burst ‚Äî one discrete, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event. Drag is the 4yo-primary control (hum yields to it); solo on one phone ‚Üí a robot ü§ñ drives the far star, pausing near consonances, so the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no second device AND no mic.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..28c66ac` (HEAD = cycle 323 `337-seismic-globe`; 20 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. Highest on-disk folder = 337 ‚Üí pre-allocated **340/341/342** to the three DEEP Builders (skipped 338/339 ‚Äî those are ¬ß323 adult IDEAS text-seeds, not on disk; collision-free). Winner shipped as `341-kids-star-pair`; losers `340-kids-duet-bridge` + `342-kids-whale-song` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß324**: *zero-server collaborative web audio is mainstreaming in 2026 ‚Äî and the unbuilt corner is real-time INTERPERSONAL consonance: two players who must tune to EACH OTHER by ear.* Sources: the 2026 collaborative-music tooling wave (Soundation real-time co-production; *Multi Web Audio Sequencer*) + this lab's own `319-hub-score`/`334` BroadcastChannel lineage, anchored on the perceptual foundation (Helmholtz *On the Sensations of Tone* ‚Äî consonance = absence of beating; the consonance/beating-cues literature). Searched arXiv `cs.SD/recent` (last 7 days ‚Äî all speech/TTS/enhancement; nothing on collaborative/co-performance/tuning) + collaborative-kids-music queries: **no <30-day on-point paper exists.** Honest freshness (JURY #5 no-fake-novelty): BroadcastChannel + autocorrelation + Helmholtz beating are foundational, NOT a <30-day technique ‚Äî the recent-and-surprising signal is *direction-of-field* (collaborative web audio went mainstream in 2026) **combined with the lab-gap audit**: the lab has a SOLO tuning toy (`272-kids-tune-purr`, one child vs a fixed drone) + turn-taking multi-user (`334`), but **zero real-time SIMULTANEOUS co-play** where two humans each hold one live voice and the target is the interval *between them*. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build is direct: ¬ß324 + the queued ¬ß322 `335-kids-duet-bridge` seed ‚Üí the DEEP-3 kids slate ‚Üí shipped the most-verifiable winner.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared**:
- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3) consuming the queued IDEAS seed (#4)**: 324 % 2 = 0 ‚Üí kids. No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (337 shipped demoable last fire). STATE ¬ß323 explicitly queued cycle 324 (kids) as **SHIP `335-kids-duet-bridge`** ‚Äî the re-flagged bold multi-user build, paired with a real-device perceptual pass. I realized that concept through the DEEP fan-out (3 interaction models of the same idea), shipping the most-verifiable embodiment.

ONE concept = *"the lab's first real-time two-child consonance duet ‚Äî two humans each hold one voice; the lock is the interval BETWEEN them."* Three distinct interaction models, each multi-user-INPUT / **raw-WebGL2**-OUTPUT / real-time-consonance-TECHNIQUE / collaborative-kids-VIBE (all dodging the SVG + Canvas2D bans), each ‚â•3 subsystems: (341) **drag-or-hum two stars on arcs ‚Üí a beam LINKS them at lock** (the most discrete/legible reward); (340) **a shared ROPE, each child raises/lowers their end ‚Üí gold catenary sag at lock** (the literal ¬ß322 seed, balanced hum+drag); (342) **each child HUMS to bend their own WHALE ‚Üí the two whales swim together at lock** (voice-forward, oceanic, the boldest). Pre-allocated 340/341/342; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none created an API route (pure client-side BroadcastChannel + Web Audio + analysis-only mic + WebGL2 ‚Üí no `guard`; no secrets).
- **Curation ‚Üí WINNER `341-kids-star-pair`**: verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build** (read 341's `page.tsx` in full ‚Äî refs-driven single rAF loop, mic-yields-to-drag, robot pause-near-consonance, peer-timeout badge flip, full teardown, typography-compliant, ‚â•64px Start, iOS-safe gesture; read all three READMEs in full + the builders' self-reports; grep-verified all three are strictly raw WebGL2 with NO SVG/Canvas2D/three.js/WebGPU and NO api routes). All three returned complete, clean, build-passing folders. **Diversity is a WASH** (all three share identical clean tags ‚Äî multi-user+voice/touch ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 ¬∑ consonance/beating ¬∑ collaborative-kids ‚Äî each dodging the SVG + Canvas2D bans), so the tie-break was verifiability + 4yo-playability + reward-legibility + JURY alignment, NOT diversity ‚Äî *exactly the discriminators on which `334` beat the bolder `335` last kids fire.* **Why 341 won**: (a) **verifiability (JURY #5, a live priority ‚Äî the lab carries verification debt)** ‚Äî 341 is **drag-primary** (the mic yields to active dragging), so the entire find-the-lock loop reaches the reward **with no mic and on one phone**, where 342's hum-primary headline is perceptual/unauditionable and 340 sits in between; the builder also independently confirmed a **full `npm run build` passes**; (b) **reward legibility ‚Äî the decisive kids gate** ‚Äî the beam *physically linking two stars* + a sparkle burst is the most discrete, unmistakable, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event (it reads with the sound off ‚Äî directly answering the concept's core risk "does the consonance lock read?"), beating 340's continuous gold rope-sag and edging 342's whale-join; (c) **cleanest 4yo control** ‚Äî drag-a-star up/down is the simplest possible mapping; (d) **deepens jury #3** (multi-user for kids, varied off `334`'s turn-taking and off the localStorage-persistence the jury flagged). **`342-kids-whale-song`** (the BOLDEST/warmest/most-surprising ‚Äî hum-to-bend your own whale, oceanic vibe pulling loved `107-ocean-presence`‚ù§Ô∏è) **lost ONLY on verifiability** (hum-primary is the least auditionable headline; ## Cycle 313 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (2 approaches) ¬∑ SHIPS `319-hub-score` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST networked / multi-instance piece: every open browser tab is one sustained voice in a serverless, wall-clock-synced just-intonation ensemble, and any tab can take the baton to conduct the whole room's harmony (The Hub, in a browser)

Winner shipped as `319-hub-score`; loser `318-ensemble-room` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß313**: *serverless multiplayer browser instruments + the wall-clock-as-conductor trick* ‚Äî the networked-music lineage (The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers, 1978‚Äì80s) reborn in the tab, corroborated by the current multiplayer-browser-instrument trend (PollySynth multiplayer polyphonic synth; Tone.js self-playing generative ensembles surfaced in 2026 creative-coding roundups). Honest per JURY #5: this is a **path-(c) consume** of the banked, research-chained `282-ensemble-tabs` seed (League/Hub lineage), **not** a manufactured <30-day arXiv claim ‚Äî the live cs.SD front is still generative-audio-conversion (carried ¬ß303‚Äì312), so I anchored on the named lineage + the multiplayer-instrument trend rather than forcing a frontier novelty. The dive's value: BroadcastChannel + `Date.now()` as a shared metronome lets every same-origin tab lock to one beat with **zero clock-sync handshake** ‚Äî the missing-from-the-lab multi-user axis, finally buildable serverless. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (c)**: ¬ß313 ‚Üí DEEP briefs A/B (two approaches to the serverless shared room) ‚Üí ship the stronger.

- **Action = Build new (Decide priority #4), AMBITION/DIVERSITY-mandate-directed**: 313 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult. No blocker on disk; no in-progress build <70% (314 + 308 both shipped demoable). STATE ¬ß311/¬ß312 flagged the **multi-user / networked shelf** as standing breadth never shipped (alongside the budget-blocked AI-pipeline-chain). The categorical-diversity menu lists **Multi-user / WebRTC** as a category absent **15+ cycles**; the AMBITION mandate ("massively bigger / stop shipping similar variants") makes the never-done networked axis the higher-ambition, higher-diversity pick over another deepen of 314/308. **AI-pipeline-chain (JURY #4) deliberately still deferred** ‚Äî needs a paid FAL budget grant I do NOT have this fire ‚Üí ABSOLUTE-RULE #6 caution ‚Üí not started autonomously (still flagged for Karel below).
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** ‚Äî cycle 312 was WIDE; alternation + "don't run WIDE every night" ‚Üí DEEP. Concept = *"a serverless shared ensemble room ‚Äî every tab is a player, the music is the sum of the room, the wall clock is the conductor."* Approach A = `318-ensemble-room` (rhythmic: editable 16√ó8 D-Dorian **step-sequencer**, wall-clock shared grid + Chris-Wilson lookahead scheduler, **three.js 3D orbital constellation** output). Approach B = `319-hub-score` (sustained: each tab one **continuous JI voice**, a slow wall-clock breath, a **conductor/baton** role that steps the shared harmony field, **Canvas2D living graphic score** output). DEEP also de-risks a lab-first networked piece ‚Äî if one approach's BroadcastChannel/render were weak, the other still ships. Pre-allocated 318/319; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; **neither created an API route** (pure client-side BroadcastChannel + Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js; no mic/camera/network-write/secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).

Both cleared the floor + dodged every banned tag. 318 (the rhythmic sequencer sibling ‚Äî strong, ship-ready, the obvious WebRTC-cross-device next step) banked as a strong seed.

(Honest: #5 NOT claimed ‚Äî path-(c) consume of a banked research-chained seed, not a <30-day frontier find; #1+#2+#3 clear the floor.)

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß309**: *Janet Cardiff's **The Forty Part Motet** (2001) ‚Äî a choir spatially exploded into forty speakers you walk among ‚Äî is touring again in 2026 (MIMOCA; National Gallery of Canada).* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (the Motet technique is foundational; the 2026 tour is the dated/named anchor). Its value is the **reframe**: it turns "deepen 308 with real stems" from a timbre swap into a *bigger idea* ‚Äî **his album, spatially exploded into a room you gather with your head**. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: continues the standing multi-cycle spatial thread (b) AND implements the Motet hook + 308's own un-built README deepenings (a).

- **Action = Continue / deepen (Decide priority #2), JURY-headline-directed**: 309 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult. STATE ¬ß308 queued cycle 309 verbatim as *"the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real Welcome Home piano stems ‚Ä¶ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2."* **JURY.md (2026-06-04) provocation #1 governs**: *"Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems ‚Äî do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle. The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it (real stems + haptics + localStorage persistence). The standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer."* This is exactly that build.
- **Mode: solo DEEP-continue (not WIDE/DEEP fan-out)** ‚Äî the orchestration WIDE/DEEP modes fan out *new* folders; an in-place deepen of one existing multi-cycle folder can't be parallelized into isolated folders. Precedent: cycle 305 was likewise a *"deepen (solo)"* of `302-mirror-canon-round`. Recorded `mode: solo-deepen (multi-cycle thread #3 ‚Üí cycle 2)`.
- **What shipped (`308-orbit-choir` cycle 2)** ‚Äî three deepenings, all from 308's own README "Next-cycle deepening" list, plus the Motet reframe:
  1. **Real stems (the headline).** The 7 synth voices are replaced by Karel's actual recordings via the public, anon, no-auth `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids + titles) ‚Üí `/api/audio/[id]` (signed URL per track) ‚Äî the SAME path the loved `227-paths-granular`‚ù§Ô∏è / `163-paths-visualizer`‚ù§Ô∏è use. `loadStems()` picks the album whose name/artist matches `welcome|karel` (else first), spreads up to 7 tracks evenly, `Promise.allSettled`s per-track fetch ‚Üí `decodeAudioData`. Each becomes a looping `AudioBufferSource` ‚Üí lowpass (the blur/sharpen axis) ‚Üí breathing-LFO gain ‚Üí its own HRTF `PannerNode`. The arc now glides **`playbackRate` (detuned ‚Üí 1.0)** + **lowpass cutoff (‚âà540 Hz ‚Üí ‚âà6 kHz)** instead of oscillator pitch ‚Äî so each recording goes from a warbling, muffled distance to clear-and-true while orbiting inward: **you gather his album into a clear room around your head** (the *Forty Part Motet* of his own piano).
  2. **Haptics ‚Äî a lab FIRST** (`navigator.vibrate`): a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you're facing* locks home (`progress‚â•0.92 && swell>0.35`, latched once via `resolvedFired`), and a `[18,40,18]` triple-pulse when the whole room resolves.
  3. **Persistence** (`localStorage` key `resonance.dream.orbit-choir.gather.v1`): gather-progress is written ~every 4 s (monotonic); on return the idle button reads **"Return to the room"** + an emerald *"your room was N% gathered ‚Äî it remembers"* note, and `startTimeRef` is offset so the arc **resumes** where it left off. "Begin again" + full resolve clear it.
- **Graceful fallback is load-bearing**: `<2` tracks decode (offline / private preview / CDN block / no featured album) ‚Üí reverts to the **original cycle-1 synth resolving-chord choir** with the full pitch-glide path intact; the top label states which source plays (`Karel's Welcome Home ¬∑ N voices` vs `synthesised choir (album offline)`). The synth code path is fully preserved, so a no-network sandbox still demos. Also added: a faced-voice **track-title** readout, a `loading` phase ("Gathering the room‚Ä¶"), and stem `src` nodes added to the teardown.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1) + ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle(#4)`. **#1** ‚Äî first `navigator.vibrate` HAPTIC output in 300+ prototypes AND first time a real audio *source* drives the spatial/HRTF layer. **#2** ‚Äî DeviceOrientation head-tracker + N-voice HRTF panner scene + featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + convolver reverb + 360 s convergence state machine + localStorage room-memory (‚âà6). **#3** ‚Äî Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* (2001, touring 2026) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Pauline Oliveros. **#4** ‚Äî multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2 (it was claimed as a multi-cycle commitment in 308's README). (Honest: #5 not strictly claimed ‚Äî ¬ß309 is a path-(b)/(c) dive, not a <30-day frontier find; the four above already clear the floor 2√ó.)

The immutability rule (no deleting/penalizing prototypes by vote) is intact; multi-cycle threads are explicitly sanctioned by AGENT.md criterion #4 and the JURY's own "Deepen 308" directive.
- **Build-verified, not browser-verified** ‚Äî unverified surface: whether 7 simultaneous piano recordings, HRTF-separated with only-the-faced-one-bright, read as a coherent "listening room" vs. mush (the central bet ‚Äî mitigated by per-voice distance attenuation + dark scatter cutoff so distant voices are quiet); whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album in prod (fallback covers the no); haptic + resume feel on a real phone; iOS DeviceOrientation permission branch unchanged from cycle 1.

## Cycle 308 ‚Äî 2026-06-04 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ WIDE (3 explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `311-kids-music-box` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..c2b8cd9` (HEAD = cycle 307 `308-orbit-choir`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit also landed). Winner shipped as `311-kids-music-box`; losers `309-kids-echo-duet` + `310-kids-sing-back` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` (fallback retention) and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß308**: *reflexive interaction ‚Äî a system that mirrors/varies the child's own input (Pachet's **Continuator**, 2002; Addessi's **MIROR** project) ‚Äî is the validated way to make a kids music piece engaging WITHOUT a no-fail wash; it carries the experience on **memory + turn-taking**, not endless forgiving noodling.* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (Continuator/MIROR are foundational; the only strictly-recent dated anchor is a Jan-2026 executive-function meta-analysis about *benefits*, not technique). The value is the **principle** ‚Äî exactly the theory for discharging JURY #2 ("build a kids piece with memory or consequence"). Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: all three explorers implement "carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed"; the winner ships.

- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 308 % 2 = 0; no blocker; the queued adult 308-orbit-choir deepening is explicitly assigned to cycle 309 (an *adult* fire) by STATE ¬ß307. STATE ¬ß306/¬ß307 queued cycle 308 as the kids build (decide clap-band's fate / break the recipe). **JURY.md (2026-06-04) is decisive and governs**: provocation #2 ‚Äî "**Break the kids recipe.** Five straight kids fires are 'new sensor ‚Üí no-fail modal bed.' Ban that form for one kids cycle: build a kids piece with **memory or consequence** ‚Äî the child can make something *wrong* and fix it, or what they did *persists and grows*. `298-echo-friend` already pointed this way; nothing followed it." The JURY's banned set this cycle: **raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬∑ the new-sensor‚Üíno-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic.** (Note: JURY #1 ‚Äî deepen 308 with Karel's real piano stems ‚Äî is explicitly "the next *adult* build" ‚Üí deferred to cycle 309.)
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** ‚Äî cycle 307 was DEEP; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate ‚Üí WIDE. Three **distinct kids FORMS that all carry memory/consequence**, each dodging every banned tag: (309) Continuator/MIROR call-and-response **duet** (memory + turn-taking), (310) Simon-grows memory game with **real-but-kind right/wrong** (consequence), (311) rotating music-box **sequencer that persists to localStorage** (persists + grows). Pre-allocated 309/310/311; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js + localStorage; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).
- **Curation ‚Üí WINNER `311-kids-music-box`**: I verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (309/310 builders again mis-reported some helper files as "pre-existing" ‚Äî the recurring memory artifact; code is genuinely theirs, created 14:08‚Äì14:11 during the run). **Why 311 won**: (a) 309 and 310 are *both* Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pieces ‚Äî the lab's over-represented form (JURY: 13/15 outputs to a screen, mostly the same way); 311 is the only candidate that breaks that pattern with a **3D physical-object metaphor** AND dodges the banned fragment-shader monoculture. (b) It's the **"massively bigger" pick** per Karel's standing mandate ‚Äî a *composition machine* the child builds, not a reactive toy. (c) **localStorage persistence is a genuine lab-first for kids** ‚Äî no kids prototype has ever remembered state across sessions; it hits JURY #2's "*what they did persists and grows*" verbatim. The curating fire also fixed a real **pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. 309 (tightest research chain) + 310 (most literal "wrong and fix it") banked as strong ship-ready seeds.
- **Ambition floor: 3/5** (need 2): `ambition: ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + recent-research(#5)`. **#2** ‚Äî KS audio engine + three.js/r3f 3D scene + per-frame sequencer clock + localStorage persistence = 4 subsystems. **#3** ‚Äî Swiss cylinder musical box (c.1796, Geneva) + Karplus-Strong (1983). **#5** ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß308 (reflexive interaction), added this fire. (Honest: KS isn't a lab-first technique ‚Äî used in 303/105 ‚Äî so #1 not claimed; persistence-across-sessions is arguably a lab-first but counted under the cleaner #2/#3/#5.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped/banked: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308 + banked 304/305; JURY's explicit bans this cycle): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬∑ no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic] ¬∑ picked(311)=[touch-slot INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D-object OUTPUT ¬∑ physical-sequencer + Karplus-Strong + localStorage-persistence TECHNIQUE ¬∑ warm-toy/craft kids VIBE ¬∑ D-Lydian-hexachord]`. Dodges every banned tag ‚Äî and the winner specifically breaks the Canvas2D-creature form its own two siblings shared.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the loop/memory + tactile/craft cluster pulls here ‚Äî `172-loop-station`‚ù§Ô∏è, `160-kids-paint-loop`‚ù§Ô∏è, `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è (loop/memory), `105-pluck-field`‚ù§Ô∏è (the physical-pluck/Karplus timbre 311 uses), `111-kids-shape-loop`‚ù§Ô∏è, `100-kids-paint-song`‚ù§Ô∏è. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY #2 + the ambition/diversity gates governed.

**What shipped (`311-kids-music-box`)**: a near-black warm screen; tap **Start** (resumes AudioContext, loads the saved tune or seeds a simple D-Lydian one so the box is already singing). A slowly-rotating 3D **music-box cylinder** (three.js via @react-three/fiber): wooden barrel + brass caps, a fixed color-coded **comb** that plucks each pin as it rolls past, raised colored **pin studs** that "pop"+glow on pluck. Grid = 14 time-steps around the circumference √ó 6 pitch-rows along the length; **tap a front-face slot** to add/remove a pin (front-face-only via a surface-normal¬∑camera test on an invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body). The pin pattern **persists to `localStorage`** (try/catch degrade), so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and the box **remembers across reloads** ‚Äî the whole point. Audio = **Karplus-Strong** plucked tones (one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch: filtered noise burst ‚Üí tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback ‚Üí A/R envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized convolver reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 0.55 master so dense patterns stay safe. **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B ‚Äî NOT C-major-pentatonic). Controls: üßπ Start fresh (clear), ‚è∏ Hold / ‚ñ∂ Spin. No-reading (colors = notes, studs = melody; a tiny caption for the grown-up). Fallbacks: no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio ‚Üí notice, box still spins. Audio disposed on unmount. Kids ¬∑ zero new deps ¬∑ zero API route ¬∑ no guard ¬∑ 4.74 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** ‚Äî unverified: KS timbre by ear (per-row brightness/damping), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, three.js disposal across a live unmount.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) ‚Üí moved 309 + 310 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with **only 311 present** ‚Üí **exit 0**, `/dream/311-kids-music-box ‚óã (Static) 4.74 kB` (347 kB First Load JS ‚Äî the three.js/r3f bundle, expected for a 3D piece), all 339 static pages generated. **No fix attempts needed** (the builder had already fixed the pluck-alignment + TS-generic issues). Zero warnings/errors attributable to 311; remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code.

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 309 (adult) ‚Äî JURY #1, the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems.** The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it: (a) replace synth voices with his real piano stems via `/api/audio/[id]` (the standing "use his actual music" directive has NEVER reached the spatial layer), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse when a faced voice resolves (first haptic output), (c) localStorage persistence of how far you'd gathered the room. This is multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2.
- **Cycle 310 (kids): ship a banked memory/consequence sibling** ‚Äî `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows, real-but-kind right/wrong ‚Äî the cleanest "make something wrong and fix it") OR `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator duet) ‚Äî both build-verified this fire. Continue breaking the recipe (JURY #2); do NOT regress to a sensor-noodle.
- **Standing breadth still unshipped**: real-world-data sonification (JURY #3 ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß289 seismic, only 1 entry and it's kids+pentatonic); AI-pipeline-chain embedded in AV (JURY #4 ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß285, Karel's explicit directive, ZERO in last 15); `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel, never shipped).
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: INDEX "Newest/Previous/Earlier/Older" chain is getting deep + STATE ordering is mixed; worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî pure client-side Web Audio + three.js + localStorage; no mic, camera, network, or secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; three/@react-three were already in package.json ‚Äî package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).

Directly answers Karel's "too similar / massively bigger" mandate by exploring three unrelated kids directions in one fire and shipping the biggest.

## Cycle 307 ‚Äî 2026-06-04 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (2 approaches) ¬∑ SHIPS `308-orbit-choir` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first spatial piece

**Git sync / env**: clean this fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..015d8c8` (HEAD = cycle 306 `306-kids-rain-shaker`); NO force-push divergence (2nd clean sync running). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present) ‚Äî the recurring stale-AGENT drift did NOT recur. `node_modules` shipped absent ‚Üí `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`. Highest committed folder = 306; pre-allocated **307/308** to the two DEEP builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `308-orbit-choir`; loser `307-still-room` removed after curation and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß307**: *head MOVEMENT (not position) is what makes generic browser-HRTF legible* ‚Äî arXiv:2510.09161 (HRTF individualisation + head movements). Empirically, active head-turning collapses the front/back & in-head confusions that Web Audio's generic `panningModel="HRTF"` suffers ‚Äî so the cheap generic browser HRTF becomes legible **iff the listener turns**, which is exactly what a phone's `DeviceOrientation` already affords. The build's core gesture IS the disambiguator. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(c)**: implements ¬ß295's un-spent head-tracked-spatial shelf.

- **Action = banked adult breadth (Decide priority #4, JURY-directed pivot)**: 307 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult. STATE ¬ß305/¬ß306 queued cycle 307 as *Mirror-Canon CYCLE 3 polish* **only if the thread still feels alive after 3 cycles; else pivot to banked adult breadth*. I pivoted ‚Äî the Mirror-Canon thread (303 ship + 305 deepen) has demonstrated the multi-cycle commitment the JURY asked for; a 3rd polish fire would be incremental. **JURY.md (2026-06-03) is decisive and points elsewhere**: provocation #3 ("the lab has banked three spatial/non-screen pieces and shipped ZERO ‚Äî resurrect one and SHIP it"), #4 ("build on the unused half of RESEARCH ¬ß295 ‚Äî the head-tracked-spatial-audio finding that produced `still-room`, banked not shipped"), #5 ("for one cycle, ban the audio‚Üívisual driver entirely ‚Äî build something whose output isn't a screen visualizer"). All three resolve to the same banked piece. This is "ship the breadth you've already paid for."
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** ‚Äî concept = the lab's first audio-FIRST / non-screen HRTF spatial room navigated by head-turn. Approach A = `307-still-room` (faithful Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*: 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn to tune in). Approach B = `308-orbit-choir` (the same spatial foundation given a **6-minute long-form, stateful convergence arc** ‚Äî voices orbit inward + glide from a detuned cluster into a warm A-minor-add9 chord; you shepherd voices home by facing them). Pre-allocated 307/308; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; neither needed an API route (pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).
- **Curation ‚Üí WINNER `308-orbit-choir`**: 308 is the strict superset ‚Äî it contains everything still-room does (HRTF room + DeviceOrientation listener-rotation + faced-voice swell + Deep-Listening framing) **plus** the long-form/stateful arc the JURY explicitly craves ("different at minute 6 than minute 0"), which fills the categorical-menu's *long-form generative (5+ min, state/memory/evolution)* gap the lab is thin on. Both built clean (full `npm run build` with both present = exit 0; each agent reported clean tsc + ESLint). Removed `307-still-room`, re-ran the **authoritative build winner-only = exit 0** (`/dream/308-orbit-choir` 3.92 kB). `307-still-room` banked to IDEAS as the calmer fixed-room sibling.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** ‚Äî `#1 never-used technique` (FIRST HRTF spatial-audio output + FIRST `DeviceOrientation` listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes ‚Äî the lab has avoided HRTF for 300 cycles; grep INDEX = 0 shipped spatial pieces despite 3 banked) ¬∑ `#2 ‚â•3 subsystems` (DeviceOrientation head-tracker + HRTF panner graph + 7-voice synth scene + synthesized convolver reverb + a 6-min azimuth+pitch convergence state machine = 4-5) ¬∑ `#3 named reference` (La Monte Young *Dream House*, √âliane Radigue, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) ¬∑ `#5 recent research` (RESEARCH ¬ß307 / ¬ß295, this fire + within-14-days). Recorded `ambition: novel-technique(#1) + ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-ref(#3) + recent-research(#5)`.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306 + banked 304/305): over-represented = kids VIBE (5√ó: 290/293/295/298/303/306), tilt/deviceorientation-orientation INPUT (290/293/303/306), matte-Canvas2D + raw-WebGL OUTPUT (most). `diversity: banned=[kids-vibe, tilt-orientation-input, matte-canvas/webgl-visual-output, pentatonic] ¬∑ picked=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬∑ device-orientation-HEADING-as-listener-rotation INPUT (a NEW use of the sensor ‚Äî rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬∑ pure-spatial-HRTF-audio OUTPUT (screen is a faint footnote ‚Äî the FIRST build whose output is not a screen visualizer) ¬∑ long-form-convergence + HRTF TECHNIQUE]`. Directly executes JURY #5 ("ban the audio‚Üívisual driver") ‚Äî this is the lab's first piece where sound is the content and the screen is the footnote.
- **Love signal**: votes API shows loved spatial/immersive pieces ‚Äî `148-spatial-palette` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `107-ocean-presence` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `227-paths-granular` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `130-tsl-particle-compute` ‚ù§Ô∏è. No shipped HRTF piece existed to love; this is the first. Pulled toward the immersive-room direction those loves imply.

**What shipped (`308-orbit-choir`)**: near-black audio-first screen; tap "Begin the orbit" (resumes AudioContext + requests iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same gesture). 7 sustained HRTF-panned voices start scattered + detuned into a soft cluster; over a 360s eased scheduler they orbit inward to an even ring **and** their pitches glide (`setTargetAtTime`) into a warm **A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth** chord ‚Äî so spatial field and harmony resolve together. `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener` (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); facing a voice swells it and floors its personal resolution forward, so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace. Synthesized convolver reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no files). Fallback chain: sensor ‚Üí pointer-drag ‚Üí arrow keys ‚Üí hands-free auto-tour, with a readable `text-rose-300` notice when the sensor's inactive (separate notice if Web Audio is absent). Thin violet progress ring + `M:SS ‚Äî state` label (`scattered ‚Üí drifting in ‚Üí gathering ‚Üí almost home ‚Üí resolved`) + "Begin again" hold state + a faint violet orbital-map canvas (guide, not the point). Full ref-based teardown on unmount. Headphones hint (HRTF needs binaural). Adult ¬∑ zero new deps ¬∑ zero API route ¬∑ no guard ¬∑ 3.92 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** ‚Äî unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet rides on this), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, the shepherding feel, and front/back disambiguation on a real DeviceOrientation stream.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no recording, no network, no secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- The design-notes link points at `/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md` (lab convention ‚Äî App Router won't serve README as a route, so the link 404s; carried, matches prior prototypes, not a build blocker ‚Äî worth a future `_shared` notes-viewer).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 308 (kids)**: 308 % 2 = 0 ‚Üí kids. **DECIDE `304-kids-clap-band`'s fate** ‚Äî now thrice-banked (strongest-floor rhythm lane but keeps losing on experience): either ship it outright (the missing rhythm/percussion lane; pairs with 298 pitch / 303 tilt / 306 shake) or deliberately retire it. `305-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath) also available. Must dodge JURY's kids bans (touch-input + matte-canvas + pentatonic-poke).
- **Cycle 309+ (adult): DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` (multi-cycle thread #3)** ‚Äî the README's three deepenings: (a) replace synth voices with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems (the standing "use his actual music" directive), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse the instant a faced voice reaches full resolution (first haptic output), (c) `localStorage` persistence so the room remembers how far you'd gathered it across sessions. OR ship the banked `307-still-room` (faithful fixed-room Deep Listening sibling) as a calmer companion. OR remaining banked breadth: `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel ‚Äî JURY #3, still never shipped).
- **Mirror-Canon thread**: parked at cycle 2 (`302`); its planned cycle-3 polish is deferred in favor of opening the spatial thread. Revivable if a vote signal asks.

**Research dive (mandatory, logged RESEARCH ¬ß306)**: web tools healthy. Targeted the mechanic the three kids briefs share ‚Äî a child's *body action* turned into always-musical output ‚Äî and which sensor to use. Anchor: **CHI 2026** *Designing Interactive Movement Sonification For Hip-Hop Dance* (+ the CHI'26 Extended-Abstracts workshop *From Movement to Sound and Back*), both 2026-dated venue entries. The thread's interest is the motion‚Üísound *mapping* (sensor-agnostic), which reframes "the body as instrument" away from the camera/MediaPipe the last 3 adult fires leaned on (287/295/302) toward the cheapest, most-private, zero-AI body sensor every phone already has: the **accelerometer** (`devicemotion`), untouched in 300+ prototypes. Honest freshness: strict <30-day cs.SD is still generative audio-AI (carried ¬ß303‚Äì304); CHI 2026 is the dated named anchor. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)**: the winner implements the "use the phone's own motion sensor" hook; the two banked siblings consume ¬ß304/prior dives.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the embodied/tactile + falling-motion cluster pulls here ‚Äî `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚ù§Ô∏è (device-motion play), `133-kids-ripple-pond`‚ù§Ô∏è, `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è (falling/raining motion), plus the rhythm/loop loves (`172-loop-station`‚ù§Ô∏è, `98-kids-drum-circle`‚ù§Ô∏è) backing the clap sibling. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared**:
- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 306 % 2 = 0, no blocker, no in-progress adult work due (the Mirror-Canon thread's next step is cycle 3, an *adult* candidate queued for 307+). STATE ¬ß305 queued cycle 306 as the kids build: ship `299-clap-band` OR `300-blow-sail`. WIDE let me re-validate **both** banked candidates AND add a fresh third (shake) in one fire.
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** ‚Äî cycle 305 was solo/deepen; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate (three unrelated directions in one fire) ‚Üí WIDE. Three **distinct hands-free, non-touch, non-pentatonic** kid experiences via DIFFERENT input axes: clap-onset (mic) / breath (mic) / **shake (devicemotion)**. Pre-allocated 304/305/306; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (Web Audio + mic-analysis / devicemotion + WebGL2, all client-side, nothing recorded/uploaded, no secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).
- **Ambition floor** ‚Äî winner clears **3 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1, devicemotion accelerometer shake-energy) + named-reference(#3, rainstick/maraca) + recent-research(#5, ¬ß306 CHI 2026 movement-sonification)`.
  - **(#1) Never-used technique/sensor** ‚Äî grepped INDEX/READMEs: `devicemotion`/`accelerationIncludingGravity`/shake-energy = **0 prior hits**. `303` and `290` used `deviceorientation` (tilt Œ≤/Œ≥ and heading Œ±) ‚Äî *orientation*, a different sensor + axis from *acceleration*. The gravity-high-pass + smoothed-energy + threshold-hit detector is a genuine lab-first.

Dodges every banned tag: devicemotion (not touch, a fresh axis vs. 303's tilt), raw-WebGL2 (not three.js/matte-Canvas2D), D-Dorian (not pentatonic). **Curation note:** the builder shipped *additive* point-sprites (against the JURY's anti-glow house style) ‚Äî I switched the blend to **matte premultiplied alpha-over** (`gl.ONE, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA`, correct given the frag's premultiplied output) during curation so the winner respects the non-additive ban.

I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified from the **actual code + READMEs + an authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (all three again mis-reported some helper files as "already present/seeded" ‚Äî the recurring memory artifact; the code is genuinely theirs, created 10:10‚Äì10:17 during the run).

Ambition 3/5; clean diversity dodge. page.tsx + 3 helpers (shake.ts / rain-audio.ts / rain-gl.ts), iOS-permission + pointer-shake + auto-demo fallbacks, hard limiter (matters most for a shake toy), typography-compliant.

Build-reviewed clean. **Cleared the floor STRONGEST (3/5: onset #1 + Reich #3 + ¬ß304 #5)** and is the no-glow choice. **Didn't win**: "clap ‚Üí groove grows" reads close to the lab's existing loopers (the jury's own flag on it) ‚Äî strong on gates, weaker on experience-novelty than shake. **Now banked a 3rd time (cyc302‚Üí304‚Üí306)** ‚Äî flagged in MORNING for a definite ship-or-retire decision next kids cycle.

All remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code. Added `CanonMode` + `mode`/`modeRef` state, a `committedAtS` field on each `CanonVoice` (the per-voice drift origin), and `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012`. Playback step 5 now branches: **Round** = the existing locked `barPhase ‚àí offset`; **Phase** = each voice loops at `BAR_SEC¬∑(1 + i¬∑PHASE_DRIFT)`, clocked from its own commit time, so voice 0 stays locked and later voices slip ‚Äî Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. The round literally never repeats in Phase.
- **Live drift HUD** ‚Äî one tinted marker per active voice showing its current loop position (0..1), throttled to ~10 fps via a frame counter (cheap; the canvas keeps its own rAF). In Round the markers hold fixed offsets; in Phase they slide apart ‚Äî a legible read of the phasing even on Karel's phone.
- A segmented Round/Phase toggle button (44px targets, violet active), mode-aware helper copy, hero + footer updated (added the Reich reference), and the README's multi-cycle section marked cycle 2 **shipped** with cycle 3 (on-hardware tuning + per-voice drift-rate sculpt) queued.

## Cycle 294 ‚Äî kids build (solo, resurrected bank) ‚Äî 286-kids-jelly-choir

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~10:20 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch ‚Üí `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` ‚Üí HEAD `06e41c1` (cycle 293, `285-mosaic-listener`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Highest committed folder = **285** ‚Üí allocated **286** (no collision; 286 was the cycle-292 jelly-choir loser folder, `rm -rf`'d then, so it's free). **AGENT.md drift note (recurring)**: the on-disk AGENT.md is *again* the stale **2026-05-21** version (no AMBITION & DIVERSITY / orchestration sections ‚Äî the force-push reverted it). Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief. Flagged again in MORNING for Karel ‚Äî worth pinning AGENT.md.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / squishy-tactile + non-standard-instrument** cluster ‚Äî `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚ù§Ô∏è, `133-kids-ripple-pond`‚ù§Ô∏è, `140-kids-string-bridge`‚ù§Ô∏è, `105-pluck-field`‚ù§Ô∏è (its physical-pluck timbre), `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è, `84-wave-fluid`‚ù§Ô∏è. Jelly Choir sits in this "the instrument is a soft physical thing you deform, not a button" vein, and (like the cycle-292 drum winner) answers the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis level ‚Äî the sound is literally the wobble.

**Research-first**: this build chains directly off **RESEARCH ¬ß292** (real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis ‚Äî *nlm*, arXiv 2603.10240 (2026)), the same dive that produced cycle 292's drum. Jelly Choir is the **mass-spring / Verlet soft-body ‚Üí audio** branch of that dive (Provot 1995, M√ºller PBD 2007). No new research dive this fire ‚Äî ¬ß292 is < 2 cycles old and still load-bearing; the queue explicitly scheduled this resurrection (research-first rule path (a): a recent dive is the load-bearing idea).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (294 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The cycle-293 STATE queued cycle 294 as *"bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling ‚Äî `kids-singing-bowl` (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or `kids-jelly-choir` (mass-spring soft-body, SVG)."* Picked **jelly-choir over singing-bowl** on **demo-reliability**: the bowl's signature *requires discovering the circular-rub* (a plain tap gives only a small strike ‚Äî the flagged "wow needs a learned gesture" risk that sank siblings at 282/289); jelly-choir is **immediate** ‚Äî poke ‚Üí wobble ‚Üí sing, zero gesture to learn, exactly the KIDS "immediate response every time" rule. Both are build-verified, non-canvas2d, non-pentatonic.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP). Deliberate: resurrecting an already-build-verified banked piece is a known-green path; the cycle's absolute is *don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled build is the most reliable green-deploy. (Cycle 293 set this solo-when-safer precedent.)

**Ambition floor** ‚Äî cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + ‚â•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬ß292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** ‚Äî grepped INDEX + READMEs: cymatics only *draw* membranes; Karplus is strings; `284` is a *membrane* modal synth. **First mass-spring / Verlet soft-body ‚Üí audio instrument in 280+ prototypes** (the deformation energy of a sprung point-mass ring drives the voice).
- **(3) Named references (verified)** ‚Äî README cites nlm (arXiv 2603.10240, 2026), Provot 1995, M√ºller et al. PBD 2007 ‚Äî all real & checkable.
- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4: Verlet soft-body physics (radial + structural springs, 2 substeps √ó 3 constraint iters, multi-touch pinning) ¬∑ deformation-energy ‚Üí synth mapping (e¬≤‚Üígain, e‚Üílowpass, e‚Üívibrato depth/rate) ¬∑ per-voice Web Audio (sine + triangle octave + LFO vibrato ‚Üí energy-gated gain ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí limiter, always-on drone) ¬∑ inline-SVG render (Catmull-Rom‚ÜíB√©zier blob bodies, Gaussian-blur glow, energy-driven mouths, harmony glow lines).
- **(5) Recent research** ‚Äî built off ¬ß292's physical-modeling dive (< 2 cycles old).
- (4) Multi-cycle ‚Äî not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: true eigenmode partials, real inter-blob collision, tilt gravity).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284,285):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√ó: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬∑ three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬∑ picked=[touch poke/drag INPUT ¬∑ inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ mass-spring/Verlet soft-body‚Üíaudio TECHNIQUE(0√ó ever) ¬∑ squishy candy/kids VIBE ¬∑ just-intonation SOUND (non-pentatonic)]`
- **OUTPUT = inline SVG**: canvas2d hit **5√ó** (271,272,275,279,280) ‚Üí **BANNED**; SVG only 2√ó in window (268 not in last-10, 276) ‚Üí **under the line, clean dodge**; SVG also needs no GPU (lowest render risk). three.js was 2√ó (283,284) ‚Äî also legal, but the bowl sibling (three.js) would push it to 3√ó and carries the demo risk above.
- **INPUT = touch poke/drag**: touch in last-10 = 272,284 (+268 just outside) ‚Üí ~2‚Äì3√ó, under the ban line. Core 4-yo modality; the real diversification this cycle is again the SOUND.
- **TECHNIQUE = mass-spring/Verlet soft-body ‚Üí audio**: **0√ó ever** ‚Üí cleanest possible dodge.
- **SOUND = just intonation** (1/1¬∑9/8¬∑5/4¬∑3/2¬∑2/1 over 196 Hz): C-pentatonic **banned** ‚Üí JI is consonant but categorically non-pentatonic.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First mass-spring / Verlet soft-body ‚Üí audio instrument in 280+ prototypes** ‚Äî the voice is driven by the *deformation energy* of a physically-sprung blob, not a tap trigger.
2. **"The sound is the wobble"** ‚Äî energy¬≤‚Üíloudness means a jelly is silent at rest and shimmers exactly as much as it's jiggling; a brand-new control intimacy for the kids zone.
3. **Two-finger / two-kid harmony** ‚Äî poke two jellies ‚Üí a pure JI interval rings out with a glowing thread between them (KIDS.md social-bonding value).
4. **Pure inline-SVG** ‚Äî dodges the canvas2d 5√ó ban *and* is the lowest-risk render path (no GPU, always renders) for a 06:30 demo on any device.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) ‚Üí `npm run build`: first pass failed on a TypeScript error ‚Äî React's `feGaussianBlur` JSX prop is **`stdDeviation`**, not the raw SVG attribute `stdDev`. ONE fix = rename the attribute. Rebuild ‚Üí **exit 0**, "‚úì Compiled successfully in 26.4s", `/dream/286-kids-jelly-choir ‚óã Static **3.57 kB**`, no errors (only pre-existing warnings in non-dream `src/lib/*`). Pre-empted the usual traps before the first build: no `function use*` non-hook helpers (`blobPath` / `Eyes` named safely), no bare `any` (the `webkitAudioContext` access is a scoped `as unknown as {‚Ä¶}` cast), no non-null assertions in the audio graph (captured `masterNode`/`limiterNode` locals), refs-not-state in the rAF loop, single `useEffect` with full teardown (oscillators stopped+disconnected, AudioContext closed, listeners + rAF removed). Build-verified, **not** browser-verified live this fire.

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 295: **adult build** (295 % 2 = 1). Strong leftover banks: **`281-midi-harmonograph`** (Web MIDI, pianist fit, raw-WebGL2 ‚Äî canvas-free, shippable any cycle), **`282-ensemble-tabs`** (first networked piece, BroadcastChannel), **`motif-memory`** (symbolic transcription ‚Üí re-performance ‚Äî upgrade to YIN first per its README), or the JURY's standing ask **AI-image-INSIDE-an-AV-piece** (his #1; `271` is the only one). Avoid another arc engine (5-arcs/48 cover it) + a 4th "fly through your music" + 5th emergent-CA (JURY-frozen).
- Cycle 296: **kids build**. The last physical-modeling sibling **`kids-singing-bowl`** (friction/stick-slip, three.js) is still banked + build-verified ‚Äî ship it with a self-teaching circular-rub finger-hint ghost (fixes its only weakness); or push physical modeling further (a *playable* plate/Chladni, a struck metal tongue-drum).

README lists the path.
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: STATE.md top is now consistently prepended (286‚Ä¶293, this entry) but cycles 280‚Äì285 + 289/290 still sit appended at the END; INDEX "Newest/Previous" chain skips some mid-200s + 279/280. Worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:

Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (no three.js needed ‚Äî SVG).
- **Honesty carry-forward**: `286` is build-verified but **not browser-verified live** this fire (no browser in the cycle; solo). Unverified risks: (a) **spring tuning** ‚Äî the constraint factors (K_RADIAL 0.16 / K_STRUCT 0.14 / DAMPING 0.93, 2 substeps √ó 3 iters) are hand-set, untested for feel; worst case the wobble is too stiff or too floppy (a one-number tweak next fire), never an error. (b) **grab radius** ‚Äî pointer pins the nearest perimeter mass of the nearest jelly within `r¬∑1.7`; on a very dense/small layout a poke could grab a neighbor jelly ‚Äî still musical, just maybe the wrong color. (c) **mouth path** ‚Äî the smiling-open-mouth quadratic is geometry I couldn't eyeball; if it reads oddly it's a 2-line fix. All fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, SVG always renders (no GPU), and any poke produces an immediate wobble even if audio failed to start.

Mosaic Listener sits dead-center: it slices his real Welcome Home recording into a navigable grain corpus, deepening the loved granular/paths vein toward a genuinely new synthesis paradigm (concatenative, not granular-of-live-input).

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH ¬ß293, 2026-06-03 ‚Äî web tools healthy): **corpus-based concatenative synthesis / audio mosaicing**, chosen to load-bear the build. Anchors: **CataRT** (Diemo Schwarz, IRCAM ‚Äî descriptor-space + KNN "play the cloud", foundational); **"The Concatenator," arXiv 2411.04366 (Nov 2024)** (real-time Bayesian musaicing); **Lee & Pasquier, "MACAT/MACataRT," arXiv 2502.00023 (Feb 2025)** (factor-oracle self-listening agent ‚Äî the deepen path); **FluCoMa "live audio mosaicing on the web"** (browser-feasibility freshness anchor). Chain dive ‚Üí build is direct (research-first path (a)): ¬ß293 ‚Üí `285-mosaic-listener`.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (293 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The queue named `mosaic-listener` as **"the strongest single bank in the queue ‚Äî schedule it on the next clean-slate adult cycle,"** and this is that cycle. **Rejected the other queued candidates after a prior-art grep**: `5-arcs` ("Journey Arc Engine v2") + `48-arc-compose` **already implement an "EDM Build-and-Drop" / cinematic / ritual arc**, so the journey-engine-alternative direction would be a near-duplicate (the exact "too similar" trap the mandate bans); `271-pigment-mosaic` already shipped the **AI-image-inside-AV** piece (Karel's #1, no longer a 0√ó gap, and the FAL_KEY/no-browser-verify risk is real for an autonomous cycle). `mosaic-listener` is the clean clear-slate pick: a genuinely new synthesis paradigm + bullseye on the "use his real piano" directive.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP orchestration). Deliberate: the absolute rule is *the build must pass / don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled, fully-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy path in budget ‚Äî especially with **raw WebGL2** shaders I can't browser-verify this cycle. Made the piece rich (4 subsystems) to honor the "not a thin solo toy" spirit. (Cycle 290 set this solo precedent and it held.)

- **(3) Named references (verified)** ‚Äî README cites CataRT/Diemo Schwarz, The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366, 2024), MACAT/MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023, 2025), FluCoMa ‚Äî all real & checkable.
- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4: corpus analysis (grain segmentation + RMS + 256-pt Hann-DFT spectral centroid + ZCR pitch, with synth-corpus *and* real-track-decode paths sharing one buffer-index playback) ¬∑ descriptor-space KNN matcher + Chris-Wilson look-ahead grain scheduler (overlap-add windowed BufferSources ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí feedback-delay wash ‚Üí limiter) ¬∑ matte WebGL2 atlas render (GL_POINTS, per-grain activation, cursor + trail) ¬∑ target navigation (pointer-drag / auto-drift Lissajous / mic centroid+RMS).
- **(5) Recent research** ‚Äî built directly off this cycle's ¬ß293 dive.
- (4) Multi-cycle ‚Äî not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: YIN+MFCC, PCA/UMAP layout, KD-tree, onset-aligned grains, MACataRT factor-oracle).

- **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 (matte)**: canvas2d hit **5√ó** ‚Üí **BANNED**; three.js 3√ó (267,283,284 ‚Äî under the line but the JURY *additionally* hard-bans glowing three.js point clouds, which a descriptor scatter would read as); SVG 2√ó (268,276); **raw-WebGL2 0√ó in window** ‚Üí cleanest dodge on *both* axes. Used normal premultiplied-alpha blending (matte, no additive) to also satisfy the anti-glow mandate.

Touch-tap was 3√ó (268,272,284), under the line.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes** ‚Äî a new synthesis paradigm for the lab (descriptor-space KNN grain concatenation), not a new palette on an old technique.

## Cycle 292 ‚Äî kids build (WIDE orchestration, 3 explored) ‚Äî 284-kids-thunder-drum

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~06:15 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch; shallow clone ‚Üí `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` ‚Üí HEAD `4e13376` (cycle 291, `283-piano-isosurface`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = **283** ‚Üí pre-allocated **284/285/286** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / sensorimotor + non-standard-instrument** cluster ‚Äî `83-kids-tilt-rain`‚ù§Ô∏è, `140-kids-string-bridge`‚ù§Ô∏è, `133-kids-ripple-pond`‚ù§Ô∏è, `105-pluck-field`‚ù§Ô∏è (its KS/physical-pluck timbre), `166-kids-lantern`‚ù§Ô∏è. The winner (strike a real drum *skin* and feel its physics) sits in this "the instrument is a physical thing you act on, not a button" vein, and is the deepest answer yet to the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH ¬ß292, 2026-06-03 ‚Äî web tools healthy): **real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis**. Anchor: *nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max* (**arXiv 2603.10240, March 2026**) ‚Äî playable real-time modal synthesis of strings, **membranes, and plates**, with non-linear (tension/amplitude-dependent) behavior. Foundational cross-refs: circular-membrane **Bessel modes** (Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound*, 1877), tympani **tension-nonlinearity pitch-glide** (Morrison & Rossing), **stick-slip friction** excitation (In√°cio/Antunes/Wright 2008), mass-spring/Verlet **soft-body** (Provot 1995 / M√ºller PBD). Surprise/hook: the lab has 130+ kids instruments but their voice is almost always a **Karplus pluck / triangle bell / additive sine in C-major pentatonic** ‚Äî and modal synthesis attacks that at the root: you choose a *physical object*, and its eigenmodes are inharmonic/**non-pentatonic by physics**, with a body-level "hit harder ‚Üí it bends" intuition a 4-yo already has. Grep confirmed the gap: cymatics (`19`,`165`) only *draw* Chladni/Bessel (visualizers, not playable); Karplus is waveguide *strings*; **zero playable membrane/plate modal synths, zero friction/stick-slip, zero mass-spring‚Üíaudio** in the lab. Chain dive ‚Üí build is direct: ¬ß292 ‚Üí three WIDE briefs (membrane / bowl / jelly) ‚Üí shipped `284-kids-thunder-drum` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (292 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The standing JURY (2026-06-02) demand is *"audit the SOUND ‚Äî the most monotonous axis; force a non-pentatonic mode; ban the glow/pentatonic."* Recent kids fires broadened the *tuning* (slendro `268`, JI-beating `272`, Bohlen‚ÄìPierce `276`, Lydian `280`) ‚Äî this cycle goes one level deeper and broadens the **synthesis method itself** (physical modeling), where the non-pentatonic pitches fall out of the physics rather than a chosen scale. The live **diversity audit BANS canvas2d-output (5√ó)**, so all three briefs use non-canvas2d output.

**Mode**: **WIDE** (research anchor opened three orthogonal physical objects; JURY "audit/diversify the sound" ‚Üí go WIDE with fresh tags; alternation: 288 WIDE ‚Üí 290 WIDE ‚Üí 291 WIDE ‚Üí keep diversifying since the jury is still flagging convergence, not asking to DEEPEN one piece). Three briefs = three physical objects √ó three never-used techniques √ó three non-canvas2d outputs, all non-pentatonic:
- `284-kids-thunder-drum` ‚Äî **touch strike** ¬∑ **three.js** Bessel-mode membrane mesh ¬∑ **non-linear modal membrane synthesis** (tension pitch-glide). **‚Üê WINNER.**
- `285-kids-singing-bowl` ‚Äî **touch circular-rub** ¬∑ **three.js** metallic bowl + cymatic water ¬∑ **friction/stick-slip modal excitation** (sustain-by-gesture).
- `286-kids-jelly-choir` ‚Äî **touch poke/squish** ¬∑ **inline SVG** wobble blobs ¬∑ **mass-spring/Verlet soft-body ‚Üí audio** (JI harmony).

**Ambition floor** ‚Äî winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-reference + ‚â•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬ß292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** ‚Äî grepped READMEs+INDEX: cymatics only *draw* membrane modes; Karplus is strings. **First playable membrane / non-linear modal synth in 280+ prototypes.** The pitches are Bessel eigenmodes (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics); the tension pitch-glide is the non-linear part of the research anchor.
- **(3) Named reference** ‚Äî README cites **nlm (arXiv 2603.10240, 2026)** + **Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound* (1877)** + **Morrison & Rossing (tympani nonlinearity)**.
- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4: multi-touch strike (position + pseudo-velocity) input ¬∑ per-strike Bessel-mode displacement on the three.js mesh (viz) ¬∑ 8-partial non-linear modal audio synth bank with per-mode decay + tension detune ¬∑ three.js render (lights, glow rings, always-on drone).
- **(5) Recent research** ‚Äî built directly off this cycle's ¬ß292 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 264,267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√ó: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬∑ picked=[touch-strike INPUT ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT ¬∑ non-linear modal membrane synthesis TECHNIQUE(0√ó ever) ¬∑ matte/organic kids VIBE ¬∑ JI-spread Bessel-eigenmode SOUND (non-pentatonic)]`
- **OUTPUT = three.js**: canvas2d hit **5√ó** (271,272,275,279,280) ‚Üí **BANNED**; three.js only 2√ó (267,283), SVG 2√ó (268,276), raw-WebGL 1√ó (264) ‚Äî all under the line. All three briefs avoided canvas2d (284/285 three.js, 286 SVG).
- **INPUT**: no modality ‚â•4 (touch 3√ó [264,268,272], mic 3√ó [275,280,283], audio-file ~2√ó, tilt 1√ó, external-API 1√ó) ‚Üí touch is *under* the ban line at 3; chosen as the core 4-yo modality (last two kids inputs were tilt `276` + mic `280`, so touch rotates back in cleanly). The real diversification this cycle is the **sound engine**, which is the axis the JURY says nobody audits.
- **TECHNIQUE**: physical-modeling / modal synthesis = **0√ó ever** ‚Üí cleanest possible dodge.
- **VIBE**: kids 5√ó (264,268,272,276,280) ‚Üí forced (even cycle); diversified *inside* the kids zone via a wholly new synthesis method + new visual paradigm (membrane ripple).
- **SOUND** (the JURY's demanded axis): C-pentatonic ‚Üí **banned**; all three briefs forced non-pentatonic (Bessel eigenmodes / inharmonic bell partials / just intonation). Winner's pitches are physical eigenmodes ‚Äî the deepest break.

**Orchestration**: spawned 3 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (284/285/286 pre-allocated), each fully self-contained (per-object concept + algorithm; audio-visual-only / self-contained / degrade-gracefully constraints; the per-brief mandatory non-canvas2d output; KIDS design rules; typography rules; the exact GitHub design-notes URL; the build-trap list incl. unused-vars, `use*`-named-helper hook trap, un-disabled `any`, the `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` getByte* cast trap, refs-not-state rAF, one-`useEffect` teardown; and the no-git / no-shared-docs limits). All three returned demoable + README, each self-reporting tsc+eslint clean (286's builder fixed an engine `useEffect` that depended on `[started,hint]` and tore down the whole audio graph when the hint faded ‚Äî removed `hint` from deps; 285's builder noted a transient ENOENT during page-data that cleared on the clean re-run). I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (`"use client"` line 1 ¬∑ **no `getContext("2d")`** anywhere ¬∑ 284/285 `three`, 286 inline-SVG ¬∑ no `function use*` non-hook helpers ¬∑ no bare `any` ¬∑ each design-notes link points at its OWN README ¬∑ no API route), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** ‚Üí **exit 0** (honest banking: both losers genuinely compile + emit their routes ‚Äî 285 `3.89 kB`), then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only ‚Üí **"‚úì Compiled successfully in 27.8s"**, `284-kids-thunder-drum ‚óã Static 3.69 kB`.

**Winner = `284-kids-thunder-drum`.** All three cleared the floor and dodged every banned tag; decider = **ambition √ó surprise √ó demo-reliability √ó directive-fit**:
- **Most demo-reliable at 06:30** ‚Äî a satisfying boom on the *first tap* with zero gesture to learn. (285's signature *requires discovering* the circular-rub ‚Äî a plain tap gives only a small strike ‚Äî the same "wow needs a learned gesture/setup" risk that lost siblings in 282/289.)
- **Most novel / surprising SOUND + deepest JURY answer** ‚Äî the only one using the *non-linear* half of the research anchor: the tension pitch-glide "bwooOOWww" is the cleanest "huh, I didn't know we could do that," and eigenmodes-not-a-scale is the deepest possible answer to "audit the sound."
- **Most visceral for a 4-yo** ‚Äî drumming is the most primal kid instrument; three.js membrane-ripple ties the visual directly to the modal sound.
- Both runners-up **build-verified** (all-three build, exit 0) and banked number-free in IDEAS.md (`kids-singing-bowl` friction/stick-slip + `kids-jelly-choir` mass-spring soft-body).

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First playable physical-modeling / non-linear modal-synthesis instrument in 280+ prototypes** ‚Äî the pitches are circular-membrane Bessel **eigenmodes** (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics), not a chosen scale.
2. **First tension pitch-glide** ‚Äî strike velocity bends all partials sharp then relaxes them over 120‚Äì260 ms (the tympani/thunder-drum "bwooOOWww"); the non-linear part of the ¬ß292 anchor.
3. **Strike position = timbre** ‚Äî center hits excite low axisymmetric modes (round boom), rim hits the higher modes (bright slap), mirrored by a travelling rim-pinned membrane ripple that displaces the three.js mesh.
4. **Direct research‚Üíbuild chain, same fire** ‚Äî ¬ß292's physical-modeling dive IS the winner's load-bearing idea, and it answers the JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis-method level (deeper than the recent tuning-only breaks at 272/276/280).

Resurrect a banked non-winner now that canvas2d should start to unban: **`281-midi-harmonograph`** (harmonograph + JI, pianist fit, raw-WebGL2 ‚Äî canvas-free, shippable any cycle), **`282-ensemble-tabs`** (first networked piece), or **`mosaic-listener`** (first concatenative synthesis, canvas2d ‚Äî wait for unban). **Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard` needed** ‚Äî `284` is Web Audio + three.js, entirely client-side; no network, no mic, no camera, no server, no secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (three.js ^0.182 already installed).
- **WIDE-curation discipline held** ‚Äî built **all 3 present first** (exit 0 ‚Äî confirms both losers genuinely `‚óã Static` + emit routes, so banking is honest) then winner-only (exit 0). Three folder-isolated builders wrote concurrently with zero conflict; none touched git or shared docs; I (orchestrator) alone committed. Loser folders 285/286 `rm -rf`'d, never committed ‚Üí free again; committed folder this cycle = **284** only.
- **Diversity audit was load-bearing** ‚Äî it forced all three outputs off the over-represented canvas2d; the kids zone's monotony is the *sound*, so the WIDE fire put three never-used synthesis methods in play and shipped the one whose sound is most novel.
- **Honest carry-forward**: `284` is build-verified but not *browser-verified* live this fire. Risks (in README): (a) the per-strike modal voice is a sine bank, not a coupled-mode solver, so the attack transient is approximate (still reads as a struck skin); (b) "velocity" is derived from inter-tap timing / drag, not real pressure ‚Äî a single deliberate tap reads as medium-hard, so the glide is always *present* but its dynamic range is coarse. Both fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, and any tap produces an immediate satisfying boom.

Risks (documented in README): (a) marching-cubes resolution 48 polygonizes on the CPU each frame ‚Äî fluid on a laptop, a very busy mix could dip on a weak phone GPU (one-line res drop fixes it); (b) the band‚Üímetaball + centroid‚Üíhue mappings are hand-tuned, so a dense orchestral mix may want different gains than solo piano. Both fail safe: the always-on synth pad keeps the form alive regardless of source.

## Cycle 288 ‚Äî kids build (WIDE orchestration) ‚Äî 276-kids-balloon-tritave

**When**: 2026-06-02 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = 275; banked seed-names 273/274 reserve no numbers (folders rm'd, free) ‚Üí pre-allocated **276/277/278** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`curl ‚Ä¶/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **calm/contemplative + non-standard-instrument** cluster ‚Äî `140-kids-string-bridge` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `133-kids-ripple-pond` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `166-kids-lantern` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `105-pluck-field` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `107-ocean-presence` ‚ù§Ô∏è ‚Äî plus the cut-paper/SVG register the lab leaned into at loved-adjacent `268-kids-shadow-theater`. The winner (a calm, matte tilt-and-drift balloon sky in an alien-but-consonant tuning) sits squarely in this quiet, parent-tolerable vein the KIDS.md market-gap analysis stakes out, not the high-energy tap-chime vein.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH.md ¬ß288, 2026-06-02 ‚Äî web tools healthy): **non-octave tuning ‚Äî the Bohlen‚ÄìPierce scale**. Sources: Xenharmonic Wiki + Elaine Walker/ZIA + Wikipedia (BP independently discovered by **Heinz Bohlen 1972** and **Max Mathews & John R. Pierce**, Bell Labs ~1984); freshness anchor that it's a *live* scene not a museum piece: *"A huge online gallery of microtonal music to listen to"* (The Microtone Fox, **Medium, May 2026**) + Elaine Walker's forthcoming BP album; timbre cross-ref = the active 2025‚Äì2026 interactive-resonator literature. Surprise/hook: every pitched piece in 280+ prototypes ‚Äî pentatonic, slendro, Hindustani JI, whole-tone ‚Äî still repeats at the **2:1 octave**; BP throws the octave out, repeating at the **tritave (3:1)** in **13 equal steps** (`3^(1/13)‚âà1.0882`, ~146¬¢), engineered around odd-harmonic chords (the **3:5:7 triad**, clarinet affinity). It sounds in-tune yet alien ‚Äî the purest "huh, I didn't know we could do that" sound the lab can offer, and a 4-year-old has no theory to unlearn. Chain today's research ‚Üí today's build is direct: ¬ß288 ‚Üí WIDE brief A ‚Üí shipped `276-kids-balloon-tritave` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (288 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The standing JURY (2026-06-02) demand is *"audit the SOUND ‚Äî the lab's most monotonous axis; force a non-pentatonic mode."* Recent kids fires already broadened the sound (slendro `268`, JI-beating `272`, banked raga/polyrhythm). **Deliberately did NOT ship the queued banked `274-kids-clay-clock`** ‚Äî the live diversity audit (below) bans both **touch-input** AND **canvas2d-output** this cycle, and clay-clock is touch + canvas2d. The mandate says the diversity audit is a hard gate and "stop resurrecting the path of least resistance," so I picked a fresh direction that dodges the banned tags instead. (Path (a): build implements today's research hook.)

**Mode**: **WIDE** (alternation: 286 WIDE ‚Üí 287 DEEP ‚Üí **288 WIDE**; and JURY's "audit/diversify the sound" = go WIDE with fresh tags. Also: never solo kids ‚Üí orchestrate). Three briefs = three unrelated non-pentatonic kids SOUND worlds, each with a *different* non-banned input AND output:
- `276-kids-balloon-tritave` ‚Äî **TILT** + **SVG** + **Bohlen‚ÄìPierce non-octave tuning** (the novel-technique reading).
- `277-kids-overtone-cave` ‚Äî **MIC** + **raw-WebGL** + **harmonic-series overtone singing** (khoomei/Lucier reading).
- `278-kids-dream-flock` ‚Äî **CAMERA frame-diff** + **SVG** + **whole-tone / Debussy** boids flock (the dream-cloud reading).

**Ambition floor** ‚Äî winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-reference + ‚â•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬ß288)`
- **(1) Novel technique** ‚Äî grepped INDEX + all READMEs for `bohlen`/`tritave`/`non-octave`: **zero hits ‚Üí first non-octave tuning in 280+ prototypes.** Every prior pitched piece (incl. slendro `268`, JI `272`, whole-tone shepard-tones) repeats at the 2:1 octave; BP repeats at the 3:1 tritave. (Note: modal/Karplus synthesis and MediaPipe/WebGPU/breath were all checked and are already used ‚Äî so the novelty is specifically the *tuning system*, not the synth/sensor.)
- **(3) Named reference** ‚Äî README cites the **Bohlen‚ÄìPierce scale**: Heinz Bohlen (1972) + Max Mathews & John R. Pierce (Bell Labs ~1984) + Elaine Walker (ZIA), with the clarinet/odd-harmonic affinity.
- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4 distinct: `DeviceOrientation` tilt input + gravity-drift physics (with mouse fallback) ¬∑ inline-SVG cut-paper render/animation engine (rAF via refs, feDropShadow + feTurbulence) ¬∑ odd-harmonic clarinet-like BP additive synth + root/tritave drone ¬∑ frame-based creature‚Üîballoon brush-collision (chords on simultaneous brush).
- **(5) Recent research** ‚Äî built directly off this cycle's ¬ß288 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 258,259,260,262,264,267,268,271,272,275):
`diversity: banned=[touch-input(4√ó: 260,264,268,272) ¬∑ canvas2d-output(4√ó: 259,271,272,275) ¬∑ three.js-additive-points(JURY) ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬∑ picked=[tilt input ¬∑ SVG output ¬∑ Bohlen‚ÄìPierce non-octave tuning technique ¬∑ matte cut-paper kids vibe ¬∑ non-pentatonic/non-octave SOUND]`
- INPUT: touch √ó4 (260,264,268,272) ‚Üí **BANNED**; mic √ó2 (271,275), camera √ó1 (258), audio-file √ó3 (259,267,+271), external-API √ó1 (262), tilt **0√ó** in last 10. Picked **tilt** (cleanest dodge; last tilt was 253 at #11).

I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (`"use client"` first line; **no three.js import** anywhere; no `function use*` non-hook helpers; no bare `any`; each design-notes link points at its OWN README), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** ‚Üí exit 0, "‚úì Compiled successfully in 27.7s", all three `‚óã Static` (276 4.07 kB ¬∑ 277 4.43 kB ¬∑ 278 4.2 kB) ‚Üí all three genuinely **build-verified** ‚Äî then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only (exit 0, "‚úì Compiled successfully in 29.3s", `276-kids-balloon-tritave` `‚óã Static` **4.07 kB**).

**Winner = `276-kids-balloon-tritave`.** All three cleared the floor and dodged every banned tag; the decider was **ambition √ó surprise √ó demo-reliability**:
- **Highest ambition (4/5) ‚Äî the only one clearing *novel-technique*.** First non-octave tuning in 280+ prototypes; it answers the JURY "audit the sound" mandate at the deepest possible level (it changes the *repeat interval itself*, not merely the scale). 277 (3/5) and 278 (2‚Äì3/5) are fresh SOUNDS but additive synthesis / whole-tone already exist in the lab.

- **On-brand** ‚Äî matte cut-paper SVG continues the loved `268-kids-shadow-theater` register; contemplative/calm per KIDS.md.
- Both runners-up **build-verified** and banked number-free in IDEAS.md (`277-kids-overtone-cave` + `278-kids-dream-flock`).

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First non-octave / Bohlen‚ÄìPierce tuning in the lab** ‚Äî the repeat interval is the tritave (3:1), not the octave; the deepest break yet of the lab's most monotonous axis (the JURY's standing "audit the sound" ask).

**Ambition floor** ‚Äî winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references + ‚â•3-subsystems + recent-research`
- **(1) Novel technique** ‚Äî grepped INDEX + READMEs: loops existed (`172`) and granular (`227`), but **live audio-capture-into-the-loop-bank (recording you in real time) / a self-listening Frippertronics architecture has never appeared** in 270+ prototypes. First of its kind.

- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4 distinct: mic-capture listener (ring buffer + 2-threshold RMS onset/release phrase slicer) ¬∑ incommensurate 7-loop memory bank (per-voice LFO + transposition + pan + procedural convolution reverb + shared lowpass + limiter) ¬∑ long-form generative movement state machine (decaying-memory displacement) ¬∑ Canvas2D loom viz. OUTPUT: canvas2d √ó3 (272,271,259), three.js √ó2, raw-WebGL √ó2 ‚Äî none ‚â•4, canvas2d chosen (continues rebalancing off the JURY-flagged three.js glut). TECHNIQUE: FFT-spectral √ó2, kids-CA √ó2 ‚Äî none ‚â•4. VIBE: kids √ó5 ‚Üí **BANNED** (adult cycle avoids cleanly); cosmic √ó3.
